The faculty members are all doctorates with immense knowledge in their subjects. They are friendly and help you with any doubts that you might have. The faculty:student ratio is good, every student gets enough attention and all doubts are clarified. The exams were conducted on a regular basis and it is designed according to the students' wishes (which is decided via a class committee). I chose this course because I feel like CSE has a lot of promising scope in the future, and in addition, the placements are higher than any other branches.Festember is an annual fest event that happens every September. The books are available at all times, the library is open at all times, you are free to pick any book and refer to information from the vast collection they have here in the library. The sports activities and extracurricular amenities are all very good and we have enough clubs for every hobby and every activity.

I chose ECE in MNIT Jaipur. As this is the second-highest branch of college also there are so many career options in this field and also you can seek software-related jobs as many subjects are similar to the CSE branch. The faculty-student ratio for each department is different. The qualifications of teachers here are very high. Even they teach really extra well. There is one mid-term and one final exam per semester. They happened in the gap of 1 month. Papers are designed at a medium level.There are two fest one is spinning and another one is annual fest called blitzchlag. Sphinx happens in September and the annual fest is between January to February. Other than that there are also various different fest. Books are available of all types. The classroom are fully air conditioning. Also, there are different sports to explore I can say all types of sports and I am a kabaddi player.

I want to learn Computer science and engineering but due to my low rank I was not able to get that, Even I didn't get a software branch in DTU. But I get Mathematics and Computing which is also a good course and it consists of 30% Mathematics and 70 %Computer.
In its computer part, It has the majorly same curriculum as computer science.

Faculty to student ratio is good in DTU.
There are around 75 students in a batch and a lot of teachers for the same subject.

The faculty is well qualified .some professors have written books also. Faculty engage with students and help them to learn.

Term exams are tough but if someone study well he/she can clear it easily.Delhi Technological University offers a lot of opportunities. More than 350 companies recruit from DTU.  Some of them are Paytm, amazon, Sprinkler.

The highest package of DTU is around 1 crore (international).

Around 95 percent of students get placed.

High packages are offered to Tech branches.
Nontechnical branches like civil, mechanical get descent packages around 7 to 8 lakh.

Infra structure is good, rules are very strict which is very good thing for students to live their limits. and education quality. here's environment is another reason to chose this university because there are students from different countries,we can improve our communication skills by talk them and we can improve our English.Campus is the major point to select this university. There are greenery,which relief ourself. I am home lover.I don't attend events.but I heard event's arrangement are good.this is the stage where you can explore yourself,if you want to do something else except studies, here you can do.

Our college is affiliated under UGC. It takes two mid terms between a semester also it has separate laboratory exam. It also take viva exams where different types of speaking skills are tested. Also our college conducts interview sessions in language lab lass so that students could fluently speak english.Our college occupies a medium campus size but still we have several memorable thoughts hidden in it. Each year our college organises several fests such as cultural fests where our college students organises it and each student have to participate in it. Based on it internal marks are awarded.

The campus is hugeeee. With a lot of sports facilities, extracurricular activities, etc. The college life is really happening. Just one setback, that even though 2-3 huge events have been conducted in my tenure here, but I haven't witnessed the main fest yet (because of lack of funds or whatever reason they come up with), which is very disappointing.Course offers too many subjects to strengthen knowledge. Academic structure is well defined and somewhat well executed. Faculty is quite supportive. But all these parameters vary for different institutes in the university.

The infrastructure of the university is most talked about. The world class infrastructure provides an ambiance which is positive enough to yield productivity. With the sports facilities, library and labs being top notch it is a feel good environment.The placement record and exposure provided by the University were 2 of the most striking features.The various events conducted in the university had prominent and recognised organisation in collaboration that would help in industrial preparation.

The campus life here is full of fun events. We have three major fests, and there are verious minor events that is organised throughout the year. The freshers are welcomed with different induction programmes and a cultural night for the freshers. The college also hosts various sport events and mini marathons(run for unity).It also hosts various talks from national and international speakers.NITS has a good rank among the NIT(s) and with the marks i obtained, it seemed to be the best option for me. Also it is located in my homestate. The college has a large campus with many lakes and green all around. It also has the Asia's biggest digital library. The course i opted is BTech in Mechanical Engineering as this is the field i would like to study further.

The campus is very good and very well all types of play are doing here like basketball football cricket etc. placement is good in this college well package offered from company side for placement percent must 75% and no backlogs. depends on your stream company offered profile.Placement of college is good and we get opportunities to excel in all field. I heard a lot about this college and when I took admission it was better than most colleges. Also, many friends of mine were taking admission to this college.

college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management - [ABVIIITM]
review_text: Our college even has a cafeteria and dairy parlour, which are very satisfactory. Our college even has a sports complex for sports like badminton, table tennis, squash and indoor games and also a cricket ground, football ground, basketball ground and volleyball ground.it consists of 6 academic blocks, 3 faculty members residencies, 4 hostels, Butterfly Conservatory Park, learning resource centre and many more. All hostels are facilitated by 24x7 Wi-Fi facility and Ethernet. The mess food is stable and edible as the mess is the same anywhere.The average salary package offered was 11.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, Google, Gojek, Lenovo, Myntra and others. Top roles offered in our course are open source software developer and MERN developer.Almost every student got placed in various companies like Amazon, Goldman Sachs, Samsung, Nutanix, Dell, Myntra, IBM and others. The highest salary package offered here was 42 LPA, while the lowest salary package offered was 8 LPA.

In fests point of view, my college is best, but it held for college students only, as we were not in our campus but our college students are very active and enthusiastic in these, so they do all possible thing to make fests a best one. Till last yr, it was intra college only, but from this yr, we thought to increase participation from other colleges students.Couse syllabus is almost updated as per the current need, but like other colleges, i feel, in this college also we are lagging in acquiring practical knowledge. Till now industry exposure is almost nil. Most of the faculties are good, but ad-hoc faculties are poor also. Venkateshwarlu sir is one of the best faculty. Also sandeep sir, our current hod is best.

Wi-Fi is available everywhere in hostels and college campus, even in mess too. We have 2 big grounds to play various games. And the sports stuffs are also given to us. Library is not that much big but enough for our study purpose. And lab is well equipped.We celebrate 4-5 functions in an academic year. Matrubhasha Diwas, engineer's day, Freshers party, and the most importantly and most fascinating Vulcanzy. Vulcanzy us the biggest festival. We also participate in national level sports and all other events.

Yes KIIT provides us so many scholarships. My brother is enjoying the KIITEE scholarship which is basically given on the basis of performance in the entrance exam. if one got rank in 1000 he/she is eligible for scholarship provided having a decent percentage in 12th board. And also there are special scholarships for foreign students. And if you secure the highest marks in the semester then you can avail the scholarship.KIIT's course curriculum is a very decent and updated one. The teachers are well behaved and interactive. Interaction between teacher and student helps us to provide a better understanding. There is a faculty named B.p padhaye (faculty of maths) who is very good at teaching and doubt clearing. Even our lab teachers are very cooperative. They are of helping nature, and you will find him /her whenever you need them.

In this college all the faculties teaching is very good. Hardwork done by teachers for teaching us is so fab. Syllabus of the course is too difficult. It's having all the academics like civil engineering departments and many companies are visited for civil, Computer, Electrical etc.The campus life fabulous because many fest like technical and cultural is organized as Aero VJTI, inferno robotics, society of automotive engineering debate and literacy societies also available. It holds annual fest as pratibimb, Technovanza.

The campus is well equipped with necessary infrastructure like smart boards, AC, wifi access, and many more. The library is really good with sufficient study material. The sports area is really great. I love to spend time at the badminton court. The campus area is very very tidy, clean and green.I am a student pursuing BTech in Data Science and Artificial intelligence stream. The quality of teaching is absolutely great with updated curriculum. If your are passionate enough and hard working then this academics can make you job-ready.

Guarantee Placement is provided for all the branches of the b.tech program after the completion of the course. Core companies visit for my concerned Mechanical branch and hire with a decent package.Sports facilities are available for the students, 24 hour high speed wifi is available both in the college and the hostel and are accessible only by the members of the organisation.

The atmosphere and the placements are the most essential thing for a student before choosing a college and the university provides these with ease. the university is the top most universities of the state. The atmosphere of the campus is so much charming and overwhelming that everybody wants to be a part of these. I am lucky enough to be a part of this.The course structure and curriculum is very much student friendly and industry ready. The way the faculties are teaching here is just mind blowing the too much enthusiastic.About the syllabus the structure of the syllabus is so easy to handle and I am pretty sure that everyone in this university will feel the same after joining this university.

It has two big fest technical is gravitas and cultural is Rivera it's on a very wide scale and participation is also too large like students from iits and nits comes to participate and singers and dancers come from Bollywood and tollywoodInfrastructure is too good sports facilities are superb WiFi is available all time lab is well equipped and size of library is also big three floors with digital reading is available too and has a large collection of books

Placements in Galgotia University are good. Every year, 70-75% students were placed. Many multinational companies visit the campus like Cognizant, HCL, Infosys, Accenture, Capgemini etc. The highest package that was offered was 13.26 lac and the lowest was 3.65 lac. Different roles were offered like programmer, analyst, software developers.The infrastructure here is quite good. It comprises of a very large and eye-catching well-furnished campus. The whole campus is provided with Wi-Fi facility. Smart classes are also there. Every year sports events are held in which many students participate every year. Fresh food is prepared in canteen every time.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: Many companies like Amazon, JP Morgan, Delloite, Adobe, etc visit our college and the college provides us with ample internship opportunity and placements. It all comes down to the individual and how he performs in the interview rounds. The college also conducts mock interviews and GD's to prepare the student for the placements.The societies here are pretty good actually and people are so talented here. Our dance society is I suppose the best because they have won many competitions beating other colleges like the IITS, NITS and DU. The society provides every student with loads of opportunities and it's pretty good.

college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]
review_text: Well I would rate campus infrastructure as below average (4 on a scale of 10). Yeah wifi library equipments everything are provided.But wifi isn't available through out the campus. Even wifi fees is taken in few hostels though it isn't provided there. Library is old and cannot support the college strength. Even books also are not upto required strength. Equipments in lab are old. The Institute takes the development fees of 5000 rs from each student every semester but i can't see any effective development.It is an institute of national Level. Highly reputed. Government college. Has the stream of Instrumentation And Control which includes my favourite course robotics. Many of my known people also passed out from the college and are living a good life.

The curriculum of the college is excellent. The syllabus is more than enough to crack any higher entrance exam with ease. Industrial tours are organized frequently to cop up with industrial needs. Faculty is the most amazing part of the college. Every faculty is amazing in their own.Almost every leading tech company visits the campus yearly and take apmle number of students at decent packages. Placement is wholly managed by the CRPC of the college. College also provides assistance and financial support to the students willing to start their own ventures.

Our institute organize various technical and musical fests. Students from all over India comes to participate in that. Also every year the institute holds sports week, where both indoor and outdoor sports competitions are held.The institute holds good NIRF ranking all over India and the placement statistics of the institute is very good.Besides this the atmosphere of the institute is very calm.It gives a good exposure to the students studying there.

college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]
review_text: The factors that I considered while choosing the college are as follows College reputation, coding culture, location, nirf ranking, college reviews, transport facilities, faculty reviews, Other than these I have considered location of the college as it was really near to my home location.Talking about the placement, major elite company and a lot of renowned company visit for internships and jobs at our college with a great starting packages and also the placement drive for the preparation of the placement are held by our training and placement cell and are really helpful.

Good overall, just some downsides, but overall the college is good and faculty too. It provides what is necessary for students and some extra curricular activities too.The college was new with some attractive facilities like specialization in AI, ML, etc. These are some of the popular fields in the market today and are quite well taught in the college.Good overall, just some downsides, but overall the college is good and faculty too. It provides what is necessary for students and some extra curricular activities too.We have various clubs for various activities, some are tech focused, some are music and so on. It's quite lively in the college and one can't easily get bored.

It was associated with Times group initiative, had phd faculty from IIT s and infrastructure, within city, near industries and other colleges. I had PCM in 12th so I decided to do B.tech. Batch size was less so it's better to concentrate. Other facilities & clubs were good, hostels are very goodVery nice activities and cultural activities on every festival,almost all students participate in it, technical events are also included in every festival.

Very good infrastructure and facilities. There is Wi-Fi all over the buildings. Some classrooms are air conditioned. All the labs are air conditioned. Hostel facilities are also very good. Medical facilities were top most. Sports and games were also given priority and we had tournaments and fests.The library is filled with a good amount of books. If we needed more books, then the central library is also available at the university campus. The hostel facility is very good, and it also serves good food. But the hostel facility is provided only for the first and 2-year students.The best stuff about the course is the teachers, the labs and their equipment. Every year, two conferences and fest are held, each in a semester.Teachers and other faculty members in our college are very well-qualified. Some teachers are somehow not able to reach out to every student as it should be happening.

There are a lot of clubs and they all take care of the extra curricular activities. You can join them according to your interest. The robotics club have won at national levels.The gender is really good and people from almost every state study here and even we have international students studying at the college.Every small and big festival is celebrated. The annual fest youthopia is connected where cultural technical events are conducted. A sports fest is also conducted once a year. The fest sees participation from colleges across the state.It is one of the good enginneeing colleges known. And there is no such necessity like a particular mark should be obtained to get into the college, they take into account the board marks and also the cgpa. As I didn't get good marks in JEE Mains but had good percentage in my boards, i opted for this college.

One of the best technology college of West Bengal. It is autonomous and it has the best faculty, I think. It has good environments. Teachers are friendly. Campus is very big and they maintain their rules strictly. There is no issue of ragging.My Campus life is amazing. Cultural festivals are very good. They conduct every year cultural fest that is the best college fest of Kolkata. We enjoy a lot there. Everyone can participate im the fest.

Faculty is very supportive. There are teachers that are very rude but this is not a problem they are very less in numbers. Most of the faculty will help you if you make efforts to do anything. Their knowledge in their respective subjects is excellent.

Library is good.There were also Ac in library.We also have sports week every year for freshers.There were also wifi provided by college which students have to use with the college email id. Labs are totally fullfilled with all the equipments.I found it best for me.I gave the examination of Wbjee where i secured some ranks which makes me realize that with this rank i can get this college so i searched online and ask some of my seniors and found it to be best for me.

It's quite good. Almost every reputed company comes for placements bit the seats are very limited. Like for Amazon you have only 1 seat from the whole campus. For TCS and all, you have a lot of seats. The loophole is that if you want to live a good life further, you should not start working at this low salary. Better start your own something. Like startup, offcampus placements, UPSC, GATE etc.It was quite good. Extracurricular activities are conducted too but like once in a year. No fests. We have to do that strike thing to conduct fest. College is not at all supportive for the fest. We have different clubs. But almost all clubs are inactive. Worst college. Please don't take admission if you want to enjoy your college life. Else, you can study in this small hall lawl.

My JEE rank was not so good that can provide NIT atleast then By seeing ranking in Wbjee college list, I found an autonomous college with good reputation about placement, attendance ratio and there is no special uniform for collegeYou all will enjoy the campus life, Branch wise events will be held, In every 1 Or 2 month atleast one Event will be there. Here are many club in college bt Rotract is most active club of our college,

Tata consultancy services, infosys, cognizant, amazon and many other huge and famous companies come and visit our college every year and helps our students in placements. Alumni is also very good and helpful. Recently some of my batchmates has developed an app for school students.Very good like regular cultural fests technical fests like maker faire,innovacion also happen every year and they are very huge and gather a lot of people and prize money is also huge and partipation is not only from my college but from other college and schools also.

The course curriculum of Heritage is according to the needs of present scenario, Every subject is taught according to the requirements of the present situation and subject matter.The faculty here is interactive and ready to help you in every way possible.The TRAINING AND PLACEMENT CELL of our college is very interactive and helps a lot during the placement drive. Many companies like WIPRO, TCS, CAPGEMINI, PWC, HCL, DELLOITE visits the campus for placement drive and hire a large number of students.

We have a very well equipped labs for every subject and the library is well equipped with a wonderful collection of books which you can use to enhance your knowledge as well as recreation purpose. we have sports facilities like cricket, football, basketball, and various games can be played.I opted for this college because I have been coding since my school days and this is what is requires in Computer Science Engineering. I got suggestion from my family members family friends and some students who have studied there.

The infrastructure of HBTU is not good as per its popularity. There is Wi-Fi, but it somehow restricted for a day. There are a lot of labs, in which some of the instruments of the lab are in active mode and some of those are not in working condition. The library of HBTI is a very good, very big library and having almost all the required books of the syllabus and other from the syllabus. Medical facilities are also very good. There is only cricket, football and table-tennis played in sports and games. Events are held in our college from time to time. Some of them are for technical and some are enjoyment type fest. The annual cultural fest is very interesting and cheerful. Almost the college life is better than any other college of this fees range.In my college, the number of professors is almost good and all are well qualified from great institutes. Most of the classes are taken by the guest facility, who have no good qualifications and knowledge is the bad point, which I observed and this happens many times. Our professors are good. The teaching quality is average. There are no smart classes. The ratio of students to faculty is 5:1. I did not get any industry exposure, actually, in my batch, no one got industry exposure. Industry Visits should also be enhanced in this college.

Campus life is safe, secured and well managed. There are many events conducted by the college clubs. Everyone can participate in the events or the fests in which they are interested in such as dance performance, band, other activities.We have got the apt course curriculum which fits with the group i have chose. Syllabus frequently gets updated with the technology. Yes we were provided with industrial visits which had served as a good source of practical knowledge.

this college gives a lot of opportunities and as I am a dancer, I get a lot of opportunities here and also many platforms to showcase my talent. The college gives every facility so that the students can utilize their time also.The course curriculum is up to date and started with the C language. The academics are also very good. The faculties are very good at teaching and also supports the students very much. They are always available to help us out.

My college have a separate cell which controls all this activities and that is KIIT Training & Placement. Placement is one of the advantages that KIIT offers since its inception.It has an impeccable record in campus placement. KIIT has always been much favored talent hunting ground for corporate world as it delivers industry-ready students. A well organized placement team streamlines the recruitment process and students get the jobs of their choice. We have like 195 companies come over for placements and by far our college have a record of 30 Lakh-Highest Salary Offered. Tentative percentage of students placed every year from our campus is like 60-70%. Yes, the institution take special steps to prepare the students for the placement season like a session of 6 mnth is offered for this placement purpose. Admission process is through a exam arranged from the college itself which is KIITEE and based on the ranks you get at the exam they give you admission. I choose this institution for the vibes it has and the student friendly nature they carry. The steps to admission are too simple. You will have to fill a online form which is free of cost
then give a online exam in the place allocated bu the institution then they will publish the result and give a individual rank and if selected they will call for a counselling process and there all the documents will be verified then you will be allocated to the hostels and all and they will give u a date when u will come with all your belongings for the final process.

college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]
review_text: The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The average salary package offered was 4.5 LPA. Almost 40% of the students got internships and training for various streams. Campus placements for especially mechanical engineering students are not like other branch students.The quality of the food served is neither too bad nor too good. There are separate facilities for medical treatment. There are separate facilities for sports of various kinds like indoor and outdoor activities that reduce your stress. There are Wi-Fi enabled classrooms, and libraries are present here

With no doubts I can say that the infrastructure of NIT silchar is one of the best in all NITs. NIT Silchar has more than 5 building with nearly 200 class rooms with more than 50 student capacity. Each branch has it's separate classroom, building and laboratories with faculties available. For the sport there two stadiums. One for cricket and other for football. There is separate vollyball and basketball track. The Institute has all the sport facility like kabaddi, table tennis, chess, and all others. Every time Institute is organizing events of sports and for athletics. Every hostels and classroom has 24*7 wifi facility. Institute has one of the biggest library of India with large number of books available. Institute has separate labs for each branch with all equipment available.There is technical fest for our college which runs nearly 2 months organizing all technical events to evolve student in experimental world with distribution of prizes. participation is huge due to involvement of other college students in our college. Cultural fest is also organized on every such occasion to make participation of the student in dancing, singing, art, poetry, story writing, quizzes etc. Huge participation is observed. Every time Institute is organizing events of sports and for athletic in college to make the student fit physically and mentally. Prize distribution with certificate is provided to each student of participation and winner gets medals. Participation is big in numbers.

The course is pretty sorted. We have semester end exams twice a year. We have assignments and practical's throughout the year which keep the students engaged. There are a lot of things which we are taught apart from the curriculum.I choose this institution because it is one of the best private institution for engineering. Though there is a lot of fee but the college is overall good. The faculties at college are pretty high tech oriented.

Placement and job opportunities are good.Placement depends on your branch.CSE placement is 100 %.ECE placement is 95%.Company visits the campus for placements. E-cell is also there.Overall placement is good if you prepare well for placement.Technical fest is Tecnoesis, which is in largest techno management fests in northeast India.Cultural fest is very awaiting festival. Many other programs are also running in collage time to time. Spring fest is also celebrated.

The cources are not very good, actually not designed with the fulfill ment of the current demands, also we have absolute marking,so getting 80 % requires have to really very work hard, while in nit patna and mnnit bhopal has relative marking, so this thing most of the students doesn't know before joining the college, but it effects their all 4 years of college.Also coming to the faculties, as faculties also have their reservation while joining the institution, like whether they are sc st or obc,so really we don't have good knowledgable professors like iits,everything we have to see from youtube or internet.and this is for all nits and iits nit only my college. And one of my professor named ds gujjar sir is really qualified, and deserves respect in the field of analog communication.A lot of good companies visited our campus like amazon,gold man sachs, capgemini, samsung R&D, codenations, etc. So that's why the students also get placed there, also the environment is a bit competitive so students are trying hands on so many things like start up, one of my friend opened a startup that connects all the hotels and restaurants of the city with a single server under him, so all the online orders were placed at an online portel which was under his control, and those restaurants who were not offering online deleivery got offered online deleivery after joined his team,a so it was no less than swiggy idea, so we have a different cell called startup center, so there is a competitive environment therefore.

We have a lot of festivals and activities in the college. We generally have two festivals named Incandescence and Tecnoesis. Incandescence is the annual cultural festival and Tecnoesis is the annual tecno-management festival of NIT Silchar. Apart from this we have Posua as the spring fest of NIT Silchar. We have 6 branch societies which conducts various events every year. We have a lots of cluba which conducts lot of extra curricular activities in the college.NIT is National Institute of Technology and It is institute of national importance and It is best for engineering after IITs. It has a good campus placement also and overall facility is very good. It has a very large campus of 625 acre. Though it is in very backward place like silchar in Assam still it has very good campus placement of about 80-85%. Companies like Amazon, Goldman, OIL visit here every year.

The campus life is great there are new opportunities every day and we have a choice to join any of it. There are a lot of clubs and societies as well. Though I am not that much of a person to indulge in extra activities, but there are a lot of opportunity.I think the course curriculum is quite vast. We are taught behavior science classes as well which has helped me personally as well as professionally!!!! Teachers are okay. Not got any industry exposure yet

We have literally regional fests every week and the technical fests include lot of good speakers from various techies in the market and they are very well known and we have 2 cultural fests every year and we have management fests also where we have training on trading and stuff and even we have late night hackathons and it's very good environmentWe access them by means of whatsapp or Gmail and we can also ask doubts on their personel phones and as per the qualification they r highly qualified and they are expertise in their respective field and they have relavant industry experience and all have PhDs and they are mostly in netweek average age of 35-50

college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]
review_text: Curriculum was prepared for the perfect profeesionals. Laboratory facilities are well that's the important for that type of course. In exams, the 40% of the marks was internal that is continuous assessment through out the semester and then 60% was awarded via written exam. In exams we have to answer from the all the units in the syllabus.Fee was feasible for the people who belongs to the Pondicherry. But for the people belonging to the other state they have to pay trice.The mode of payment accepted by this college in first year student through the bank DD. And for the students of other year they accept the mobile banking, UPI, ect.

There are so many courses are available but I think this course is little bit unique and time saver. Some students firstly do B.Tech after the completion they choose MBA which takes a long time period of at-least 6 years. Here I choose integrated programme of B.Tech+MBA which is 5 years course and here it save 1 year duration which is valuable. Everything is in university is good just one thing is to improve here is if they also provide swimming-pool facility. Their are so many fests celebrated every year in which dhorahar, kavyanjali, abhiviyakti etc. Are main functions.At university the faculty members are well acclaimed and well read. college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology
review_text:
If there is something which every student likes about the college, it would be the ambience that the college offers. The college is strewn with tress and vegetation. Campus life at IIT (BHU) is simply amazing, which can be vouched by every student studying there. There are over 20 clubs under six councils which ensures that we have enough options to go after our hobbies and passion. The clubs include the Literary Club, The Aeromodelling Club, The Business Club, The Film and Media Club, The Robotic Club, The Kashi Utkarsh for social causes, The Club of Programmers among many others. Each of the clubs organizes competitions and workshops for the students regularly. It won't be an overstatement to say that the students learn more from these clubs than they do from their academics. Even the sports facilities are world class, there is an option for nearly every game- we have a cricket field, hockey and football fields, Athletics track, Lawn tennis and Basketball court. The construction of an indoor sports complex just recently begun in the lockdown. The availability of these facilities is the reason that we hold the largest inter-collegiate sports fest, SPARDHA, every year.
The diversity we see in the college is also unique. The college even though situated in the Gangetic plains boasts of having the highest number of people coming from south India to this college than any other. One even sees many students from the North-East. The percentage of girls has significantly risen after the introduction of supernumerary seats by the government. Hence, the gender ratio has substantially improved from what it was three or four years ago.
When it comes to tolerance towards the people of other race, gender, ethnicity etc. there is no doubt people respect others a lot. They are very encompassing the other people's beliefs and treating it with respect.
As of now, there is no student politics in our college. There is this student parliament whose elections are held every year under the purview of the college administration itself.The course curriculum is well laid-out and clear, offering only major in the branch one is enrolled in. The provision to bring minor in other courses of one's desire is under the process. The exam structure is pretty fair, though sometimes professors fail to complete the whole academic syllabus due to less time allotted under the academic course. On an average, there are 35 lectures of an hour each for a course, which is less; it must be around 40-42, as I see from the courses on NPTEL and also the complaints of professors to have a week or two more for their course. Moreover, the syllabus really needs to revamped according to the latest industrial requirements. There were two industrial visits that were organized by our branch society only. The college is yet to take any initiative on its own. Our placements are more than simply good because of a strong alumni network. As far as research facilities are concerned, the college still lacks at it. Though according to the latest news, many research facilities are being set up - the most recent one being the set up of a super-computing facility at the college. The college has been the place where I have seen the best growth in myself. Various clubs, sports facilities, academics, they all have been major contributors in making who I am today.
There are many opportunities to learn if one tries to.

I opted to study in Amity University because I couldn't clear JEE and I wanted a decent college with decent placements. Furthermore , the lush green campus attracted me a lot and I wanted to be here for 4 years. Moving on to admission procedure, students with percentage above 80 in their 12th boards can get direct admission whereas for others there is an entrance test which is easy to crack in. By the way , I had 82 percent in 12th CBSE so I got directly admitted.The fee for my course is around 1.6 Lakhs per semester and it increases by 5 percent every year. The fee structure is undoubtedly  expensive but on a brighter side it's transparent. It can be paid online. Moreover, no additional fees is charged to secure an admission except a sum of Rs 20000 as security amount which is refundable and quite normal to collect from students.

Our university is the largest university in Indian and 2nd in management. It has all the Infrastructure mentioned. It has many sports trainings available. wi-fi is free through out the university. There are separate blocks for labs and whole lot of equipment's students be needing. We have a block named 13 where all the sports and other curricular activities will be encouraged.There are many companies like amazon,google etc, Mostly 70%-80% of students will be placed in jobs offered by our university. Certain company comes and interview students applied and takes them if they do good enough. The alumni networking for jobs is good and recent alumni Tanya Arora which was placed with 1 crore package placed at amazon

Every college have it's pros and cons but according to me I have great back support of our faculties not only in our academic but also in our normal life. I can say that GLA UNIVERSITY is one the most great emerging university with lots of greater opportunity. By the way our college is already ranked no 1 private college. All the facilities in the university are well educated and have have good knowledge of subjective and practical subjects they can be good motivator whenever you need them they are with you in case of your life problems. They are good in nature. They are practically sound in their subjects.

I opted for this University because of it's research- driven and interdisciplinary approach towards education. I had a chance of pursuing courses in other areas apart from my core courses and also work on a research project under the OUR program offered by the University.The Academics are pretty good. The faculty has a really good subject knowledge and they support you throughout , if you interact with them enough. Academic resources are easily available and often, extra resources are shared by the faculty.

In my university the sports faculties are very good that national level player are also come to LPU for playing tournament organized by LPU or even Punjab government also organize tournament inside lpu and wi-fi is little slow where there is low signal and our library is 3 floored so there we get every book related to our course and there are 2such libraries in our college and lastly lab equipment are also good and we find no difficulties while doing practical's and moreover there is always a lab assistant in every lab who have duplicate of every equipment so when things goes off they help us. So finally its good.Every year our college organize 2 major events which are one world and one India so in one world the countries from where the college have students they will represent their countries culture and by that other countries will know about the other countries and in case of one India there will be tents as many as our states and there the students will represent their states by showing their culture by that foreigners who cone to study at LPU can know about our India. That's the major events and there are many more small events that are organized by LPU every months

college_name: IIT Roorkee - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]
review_text: I choose civil because I love it. because it is the best college for civil engineering in the world and is the first of its kind in Asia. I have a keen interest in structures around us. so to learn more about I choose it. for the admission in college you to clear two step of entrance exam first one is JEE Main which 90 question of 4 marks each (30 of per sub. phy. chem. math. ) and then JEE Advance format of which varies every year.The exam structure is very simple there are two exam per semester named as mid term and end term which have 50% and another 50% weightage respectively and also the praticals and the assignment given all the semester also counts in CGPA. college is helpfull for research based and this is affordable for student of any economy class.

Gender ratio: 50:50.

And more than that there is no any type of politics or raging's. LPU is our 2nd home.For every semester we will have upto 6 subjects and with 2 labs. While coming to exam structure: If you are taking admission for UG. Then you will have exam based on your 12th class syllabus. In every summer holidays we will have different activities like doing internships, joining in NGO's etc. And in the university we are having so many student organizations.

Gender ratio: 5:3 for boys and girl. There are 150+ student organization that organization is conducting events on regular basis. Like robotics, sports etc. All students organization are of good economic conditions at the time of events because lpu also sponsors them for there events.Feasible compare to other university. But there is a charges of hostel, mess and laundry which makes sometimes difficulty for students to manage the fees at the time. Yes college from the transparency in the fee breakdown. The fees depend upon how the students perform on there test.

There is a fest called revothsava every year
Apart from that fests from all branches and courses happen throughout the year. You can take part in various competitions. This fest provides a platform for the young to showcase their talent in the arenas of Dance, Music, Theater, Literary, Computer Games and Sports. The ecstasy and the sheer joy seeing a campus of 45 acres decorated with the cultures of Bharat on one side and the young people showcasing the talent on other side is boundless.Placement in our college is fine. For mechanical engineering companies like Bosch, Toyota, etc visit. The general steps are the same as other colleges, like aptitude round, group or single interviews, etc. I'm not really sure about the percentage of students placed every year.
The institution takes steps like placement training every semester which is a while different subject.

Depending upon what course you have chosen your course structure and curriculum varies. Giving you an example of my course which is mechatronics engineering. The mechatronics subject is a combination of various disciplinary. we get to learn about mechanical we also get to learn about electronics computer science and practical applications of different subjects. Of course, every branch differ accordingly and there are different applications in the future for different fields you get to do various experiments various practical applications and apart from studies there are these University e-government societies that allow you to participate and work under no pressure from anybody 2 gain much more practical knowledge other than just sitting in the classroom.I have opted for an education loan, of course, there is an option for scholarships but I have opted for an education loan that you can avail of very easily from the State Bank of India which is there in the university it is very easy to avail for education loan from the State Bank of India you can get up to 7. 5 lakh of rupees with no mortgage and with a minimum amount of interest rate for the document you can contact the university who will provide you with the documents that you can submit it to the State Bank of India which is present in the University campus as the bank ok is familiar with University you can avail loan very easily and with no to minimum hustle.

college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology - [IIEST] Shibpur
review_text: The campus life is a blessing especially for those who love nature. Every month there are some cultural and technical events. It is a renowned. University, I was passionate about computer so I decided to, take admission, and this college has great outreach with companies and the admissions process was made so easy with just a form and rest after reaching the university, the assistance provided by the faculty was great in easing the complex process.The campus has a diverse range of variety in students, and there is a healthy lifestyle and environment. all kinds of labs are established to give hands on experience to students, and they are available whenever required, regular lab class are organized, and the teaching staffs are also very good in the field.

No doubt NIT Silchar has one of the most beautiful campus in country. If you truly are a nature lover, you are going to have a good time there. I loved so because I used to go for a morning jog and congenial atmosphere was my source of inspiration.
Facilities:
From infrastructure point of view also, NIT Silchar is a good choice. Let me give you my example, I stayed in single room for 3 years and shared (1st year was a merit based allocation; for last 2 years its compulsory to have single room). Apart from this you have good sports facilities, standard class labs, shops and eateries. During final year (2013) we heard this news that NIT Silchar is going to have indoor swimming pool and other gaming facilities (synthetic court for badminton, basket ball, etc.). You can get an update on this as well. Further, you have daily bus services to visit Silchar town and get required things.
Summing it up, Life at NIT Silchar is something which you need to experience. It's cozy, a little hussy, full of excitement and opportunistic.Tecnoesis the 2nd largest teno management fest of North East and Incandescence the largest cultural fest of North East.The annual cultural fest of NIT Silchar. It is one of the most awaited events of the college. This falls in the month of February. Students from various college from all over the country participate in this festival. Tecnoesis is the technical festival of NIT Silchar.
This fest falls in the month of October. Here we see young and energetic minds showing their skills. Various events like Robotics, Paper Presentations, Quizzes & lots of exciting events take place for a span of three days.

The gender ratio is nearly 7:1. The institute has several clubs to facilitate extra curricular activities in which the students are interested. Several workshops are conducted by experts all over the country. Robotic competitions are a part of robotics club which organises several robotics events. The literary club called as illuminates is a very active club in the campus which organises several debates, writing competitions every week. Every year, elections are held for the pists of the presidents for each of the clubs and students union body named as gymkhana union body.Seniors in the college are very friendly and help their juniors in every possible ways. They guide us in the right dirction to brighten our carees in the way we want. The founder of GO IBIBO, the main architect of arogya sethu app is an alumni of our college. Institute arranges an alumni meet every year which is very helpful for the students to gain maotivation and clear their doubts about their career.

I got admission on merit basis of jee mains. Generally students are admitted in 3rd and 4th week of July through branch alloted to students by josaa. Some students also get dmission through csab special round counseling. Foreign students also get admission through Dasa quota passing cet exam.We have 2 semester in a year. Each semester have one midterm and one end term examination along with quizzes. Regular classes and Labs are conducted. So many workshops are organised to keep us industry ready. Industrial visits are also organised. Teachers are really very supportive and good.

The campus us huge and has students from almost all the states and many countries that makes the campus a lot diverse. About gender ratio it's pretty decent as there are 8 hostels for boys and 6 for girls. college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: Engineering classes have a less female children specially in department like mechanical. But there were enough girl students in the college. In our department the sex ratio was 3:7. review_text: All the company visit the campus like amazon google Microsoft mastercard,etc,The alumni network in too good for placement  and job referrals. Extra curricular activities and event celebrations are quite lively and energetic when you talk about our campus. Events like finale of popular shows like Miss PTC Punjabi, annual Indian Science Congress, performance by singers like Guru Randhawa etc are quite common on campus. 

Apart from that one can engage in host of extra curricular activities ranging from Arts, drama, dance to sports through various clubs and organisation in the university. 

Infrastructure facilities and other related facilities are top notch and are in line with the reputation of the university. Admission in LPU is done based on the merit cum entrance test criteria. That is either one has to qualify the entrance examination conducted by the college which is named as LPUNEST or have to qualify the national level JEE Mains examination. If your score is good you will be offered admission in the college. However there are certain portion of seats which are filled through management quota that is based on direct admission. One reason I opted for this college was that it was the only popular college offering the Food Tech branch in B.Tech which I was looking for.

college_name: IIT Dharwad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITD]
review_text: The course curriculum is the same as any IIT in this country. It has one of the best course structures. There are many tests between the semester to check whether a student is getting the subject or not. Project works make it more interesting to study the course. Most of the courses are practical based but the theory is also very important to learn.I got admission in this college after I have qualified two main exams of this country. First I have given JEE mains. After I have qualified JEE mains with a good rank. I have given JEE advance that is necessary to get admission in IITs. After the cut-off was out, I was eligible for this college.

Companies like Amazon, Fico and many other MNC companies come here for placement drive. We understand all the concepts clearly even if the subject is a complex one like mechanics.  Some of them have a lot of experience in this field; they are approachable and can be asked for doubts and academic help at any time.

Campus life is also amazing. Students from different cultures, different district, different state and different parts from India are here. 50% are from Andhra Pradesh as of state reservation. Rest of them from them are from rest of India. Every festival is celebrated here, every national day is celebrated here. Interaction between seniors and Juniors is also very good. As such no serious Ragging case is there. Whenever there is a fest a lot participation is there from students even from teachers. Academic schedule is also hectic.Campus is newly built. college_name: IIT Kharagpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITKGP]
review_text: Expect for the gender ratio the campus like is great, the hender ratio was around 7:1, the work culture is very good thecampus is free to roam 24/7. No restrictions. college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]
review_text: I believe that our curriculum is decent enough. It may not be the best and most up-to date but its core is really rigorous. All basics are covered that an engineer is supposed to know along with appropriate lab sessions and practical knowledge. Certain niche topics are also taught at an advanced level to provide us the competitive edge. for example in mechanical manufacturing is taught at a really high level. appropriate infrastructure is also there . recently our college opened state of the art center of excellence.  the point is that most facilities are available to students for use. Lab assistants and technicians are usually more than willing to help students with all the equipment. It is totally up to the students to take an initiative and use all the resources to learn. Faculties are like it is everywhere. A few professors are really great and knowledgeable and a few of them know nothing and are terrible. But a vast majority of them are just fine. They are good but not the most driven and passionate. It is up to the students to show interest.PEC is a reputed institution. It provides enough opportunities and flexibility to students to realize whatever they are passionate about. The curriculum is also relatively modern. It is not as good as many of the IITs but is still pretty good. Before getting admission, a few people told me that PEC is an old college with is deteriorating with time. I talked to a few other people, some recent pass outs and came to know that it may not be able to inspire and improve students who aren't that intelligent passionate or self-motivated , But there is surely a lot for people with some ambition to do well in anything they like, be it academics, research, higher education, placements, sports, coding, robotics, extracurricular like drama, debating graphics, designing, singing etc. Another factor is that they have strong emphasis on real world exposure, as in everyone does a mandatory internship in 6th semester. A fantastic Alumni network is always there to help guide the students.  So I took admission in PEC based on the wide variety of feedback I got

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: Some faculties are really good others are just average like in every other college. Academics is ok. Curriculum has many subjects which are not related to core field which is very bad because people should have more experience in their core field.Placements are really good if we see from prospective of private college. We see many companies coming and offering great packages. About 90% is on campus placements. But as students are increasing every year placements are decreasing.

The placement is very good. Almost all the students are placed at the end of the 4th year. Companies like IBM, TCS Wipro Accenture, High radius, Amazon, Microsoft, and many others take part in campus recruitment. From the end of the third-year students are getting placed and the process goes up to the end of the 4th year. They are many alumni who visit college every year. They are a placement cell in which students are trained and prepared for college placements.The campus is humongous, they provide every sports facility, they have separate Fields/courts and stadiums for each sport. Every campus is equipped with Wi-Fi. They have each library for each school with one main library which consists of 5 floors. Labs are equipped with all the necessary requirements.

The labs in our college is good and a number of extra curricular activities are orgainsed. Though the sports facilities are not so good as only good players are allowed to play the sport and no proper coaches are provided for the betterment of team only seniors take care of the team. Overall sports activities are a bit below averageThe syllabus used has improved but still there are many irrelevant topic that make students disinterested towards the course due to lack in job seeking nature of the course provided.There are many conventional subjects which I don't think can create a lot of enthusiasm in students because the things now have got advanced

college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]
review_text: Athletics have great importance in our college as students get chance to play at other colleges IITS, NITS etc, they learn importance of victory and defeat in life through experience gained their. Library provides essential study hours and calm environment to students who are preparing for high level exams like UPSC, GATE, CAD, GRE ETC with facilities. Lab equipments are moderate and are kept in proper conditions.Campus life is awesome, the greenary and healthy environment of campus drives students to fall in love with beauty of nature. Cutural and techinal events like UTKANSH and TECHNITI are held every year.The moments enjoyed by students in shows are immortal and remain best part of life. Utkash and TECHNITI are biggest three days events of this college which organises various inter colleges competitions.

The infrastructure of the college is quite modern. It has three building to hold nine departments of B tech. It also has separated building for mass communication,M tech, Arts and law department all within the campus but has separate campus. The laboratories are quite good with modern technologies and CS and BT labs have ACs. Though all equipments are up to date. The campus holds a world class central library with digital library as well. Three sports ground along with cricket ground is there.The institute has a library that has a variety of reference books, books, magazines, resource materials, journals, etc and it the favourite spot for the reader and book lovers. Course curriculum is relevant and it makes the students industry-ready. I think Heritage Institute of Technology is one of the best engineering colleges in India.

many company visited in university like Tata motors Microsoft google amazon which given job to student who have qualified there entrance paper one of the highest package given by Microsoft is 42 lakh per annum.famous startup started by seniors is making electrical vehicles entrepreneur cells is also there by which interested student get startup idea to start businesscourse provided by university is revised after every semester new subject  topics added to hive exposure to student recently new course is added named as sustainable development in which sustainable practice is thought. in each semester we have industrial tour so we can understand better about theory part as well as practical part.

Academic is structure is good. Some faculties are not good at teaching.Usually i get bored in the lectures.Labs are interesting and i get to learn so much through labs than in the classroom. Also the extra curriculum activities provided by the committees are excellentVJTI is one of the oldest and prestigious college in Mumbai for engineering. It has good lab facilities and is among the top colleges in mumbai. Also i didnt wanted to stay hostel as my home provides a better environment for studying that why vjti was a better option

Large campus more than 1000 acres. WiFi and lan - Quite decent connection in all hostels and around campus. Library are decent but reserve people enjoy all facilities. Way too restrictions for general section. Sports average - Big sports Complex with good basketball, badminton courts, football,cricket, no proper space for indoor sports like chess, tt, carrom,bad tennis court, A well equipped gym. Lab equipment are good but not proper managementTechnical Fest are average, not receive participation from our colleges around the state. Sports Fest - Excellent and hosts around students from 30 other colleges. Though lack some management. Cultural Fest - Good, It also doesn't recive participation as it should receive. Around 10-15 college participates. Lacks management as it has good budget. A lot of other extracurricular activities takes place. College life is decent.

I am Studying at National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh, so everyone has to attempt for JEE Main for getting into NIT, I appeared for JEE Main in 2018 and got a Rank of 17k and I always wanted to explore my intrest in Computer Coding and stuff, so I opted CSE and I got into NIT Andhra based on my Rank. After getting a Rank, there will be a centralized portal for Seat Allotment, in which we will selected seats based on the personal preference depending on the Rank and after allotment of the seat we have to visit the College and then we will get a joining date. This was the complete process, it seems simple but it's not simple. Getting a Good Rank is itself a big deal.There will be one Big Cultural Fest named Vulcanzy, it will be a 3 Day long event comprising of both Technical and Cultural Stuff, people from nearby college also come to our fest. This is the only fest which is celebrated in our college. There are some other small functions like Traditional Day, as our college have intercontinental students as well so we celebrate this with great joy.

college_name: University Institute of Engineering and Technology - [UIET]
review_text: For cs and ece its good but for mechanical mot so good. Many companies like infosys and wipro comes to campus for mass recruitments and gives placement of about 4 lacs per anum. Other companies also comes but for mechanical very few like adani.Good govt. college for engineering and economical as well. The faculty is well qualified and friendly. Also the university campus is nice and beautiful with trees all around. Seniors are cooperative and nice in a ragging free atmosphere.

college_name: University Institute of Engineering and Technology - [UIET]
review_text: Not many companies visit our campus. Infoysis and wipro visits regularly. Only a few other visit.No alumni networking for job referrals. I don't know any alumni or startup because our college prefer marks over experience. Two of our college students selected in Amazon at the package of 2800000 but our college director didn't allow them to join in final semester.As far as my university is concern there are a lot of events but my institute is very bad at this. Hostal life is very bad. There is no quality life. Food is also very bad. Our college is not organising our annually fest for the last two years to save money.

Before take the admission in this university I search about this university and comparison to other university I realized that Lovely professional university is better than other university in all formats studied, practical knowledge as well as placement drives and I also asked my elder brother who is already studied in this university and get better placement through this university he told me about the rule and teaching style and what was the opportunity which I get when I take admission in this university For better placement as well as getting practical knowledge and different types of opportunity in studied as well as games.The opinion on the course curriculum is to get different types of course which you want to getting better knowledge where you have interested and about the academics the rule and regulation is so good for to awareness of the different types of opportunity and to also enjoyment apart form studied like singing, dancing, games, etc. and in the lovely professional university the facilities are well educated and also well trained theory as well as practical. Related to my course Our Jaspreet Sir who teaches as Design of machine he teaches as well with proper diagram as well as daily used.

A bit expensive but less than other colleges. A rough figure around 16-20 lakhs depending upon many facilities you take. They do provide fee break down and you can also take the student loan if wanted. You may think it's way to expensive but lemme explain its less than other private colleges but more the govt onesYou can easily go the website and apply for the entrance exam i.e. Kiitee which is conducted every year and most beautiful thing it's free of cost so you don't have to bear any cost. Every year it's on the last week of April. Well on the first week July academic starts

The curriculum is a bit too much for students, although the facilities try their best it's too much in terms of learning and understanding. Industrial exposure and practical learning is on weak side because there is not much attention given to this. Faculties are good some are great others are not. It happens in every college, that some faculties teach with interest others just for the sake of teachingThe campus is very big, approx 780acres, but most of it is covered with trees, the college has big classes with state of art infrastructure. Certain areas need to be checked again. Sports facilities are good, the college hosts the biggest sports fest in north east india. Library is very big with all kinds of books available. Lan speed is just good, sometimes it lags.

There are two main events organized by vit one is Gravitas which is a technical event and another one is Rivera which is a cultural event. In gravitas no. Of participants is approx 10 thousand and in Rivera no. Of participants is approx 15 thousand. Gravitas is a 3-day fest that happens in the fall semester and Rivera is 4 days event that occurs in the winter semester.Many top companies come to the campus e.g; Microsoft. Last year (2020) approx 20 students got placed at Microsoft with the highest CTC 42Lac. The alumni network is very good they are always connected and their's mode is online. UNIVERSITY has a separate portal for alumni.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: Campus life is good, it all depends on you how you want to manage your time between studies and other things, if you want you can make these four years the best years of your life. Thapar has 50+ cultural and technical societies, it's annual fest Saturnalia is decent and you can witness some big names coming up and performing.The course curriculum is good and updated and in close coordination with international institutes. The faculty is highly qualified from top institutes from india and abroad and have deep knowledge of the subject. The only drawback is that there is no such emphasis on practical experience.

When the campus is it is one of the best campus of the north India side having vast infrastructure. Number of students are about 60000 and they have six different different hostels for boys in six different hostel for girls playground is very huge you can play any game in that playground and they are also providing the world class of sports the students are coming across the world of different country and 29 states everything is really different of this university each and everything is unique whatever and for me I thought it is one of the best part of my life to get join in this universityDr. Lovey raj Gupta best ever faculty member of lpu he is the head Dean of CSE. well it is not easy for anything going in such University and scoring good CGPA what type of education Bihar providing is really a good job features they are very excellent coming for providing internship to the university students, they have nice exposure, teachers are available 24 into 7 if you are residing in the hostel we can go to library at your choice whenever you want to go the syllabus is also completed before time so everything is good here

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: Initially i wanted to pursue engineering in Computer Science. But upon discussion with my relatives and parents, i opted for Electronics and Computer seeing so many students going in for computer science. The reason for choosing this college is that based upon my jee mains score i wouldn't be able to get in any NIT, and after the ranking of some top NITs, then comes the number of TIET, which is very renowned. So also considering the location criteria and the distance from the home, this institute seemed to be perfect for me. The course of electronics and computer is also very nice. And i am glad that i selected this after listening to the advice from my parents and relatives.The course curriculum is too much inclined towards the electronics side due to which i faced some issues. But from third year, this course is almost oriented towards computer science subjects. The faculties for the following course are very nice and corporating. They are always ready to help you in any kind of problem. There is a capstone project in the fourth year which helps in developing and polishing upon some of the skills before sitting for any interview.

The placement is by campus interview and our college have tie up with many hospitals.throughout the India. Some hospitals like Apollo (chennai), BLK(Delhi) and MGM&RI (pondichery).and our college provide internships about a period of six(6) months for nurses and we can learn many clinical experience through posting and we have different time schedule like full day shift, night shift and posted in almost all week like ICU, casualty, SICU, medical ward etc.Most of the staff are doctorate in their department and some subjects like external ( pathology)are teaching by medical doctors.their are mostly MBBS. And some of the faculty are M.sc and they are dedicated in teaching and they have excellent clinical experience. And they have also take class by video and slide presentation and through demonstrations.

The placements here are above 85 to 90 per cent always. Yes, internships are provided from 3rd semester and offers around 5 to 6 k per month. The placement companies offer around 5 to 7 lpa and some also go till 20 lpa. The companies like IBM, hp, Oracle, cognizant and Amazon come for placement.The infrastructure of the college is really good and most of them love it. The teaching quality is not up to the mark but if you have the right teachers then you can get the right help. You can take part in a lot of activities and make the best use of the college life.

college_name: IIT Indore - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITI]
review_text: Our syllabus is very much updated as it involves electronics also which is used in industries these days. Although we not provided enough industrial exposure but we have almost all kinds of machine in our lab for proper learning experience. Faculties here have immense amount of knowledge, but some are not good at delivering it but when asked about a specific topic or any doubt, they put all effort to clear it.College provides very fast wi-fi connection and also has lan connection in our hostel rooms. We have good sports facility (we have ground and equipment for almost all sports ). The new library which has been constructed just a few month ago is very large with sitting capacity of more than 2000 students. All the labs are well equipped and maintained.

comedk Karnataka Professional Colleges Foundation, in their endeavour to offer an effective, fair and objective testing procedure to determine merit of students seeking admission to the member institutions, have formed ???Consortium of Medical, Engineering and Dental Colleges of Karnataka??? (COMEDK). COMEDK has been assigned the task of organising a common entrance test for the academic year 2020-2021. COMEDK entrance test & publication of test score and rank list will be followed by centralized counseling (Single window system)fee is quite high but as it's private college so better i put no comments.like its almost 2.5 lakhs for college then additonal 84k for hostel.and that cant be the end of list because notes and all other expenditures are there which sums up that is a very large number if i gotta calculate for whole 4 years

The courses here are good. They designed it in such a manner that anyone even without computer background can follow up. They changed the curriculum this year which I heard is very good. Facilities are really good. They support our projects and everything and also they will complete the whole portions and keep tests in time.To be honest , Campus Life is somewhat dull. But we have Gokulastami which is celebrated very grandly by having a series of contests between different departments. It is really fun and then there's ANOKHA - annual tech fest of Amrita. It is very grand and really fun.

The examination process is the very strict in the college any issues at the examination then it will take the serious action on the issues the examination faculty is very considerable persons we can write our exam politely.By visiting our intermediate college. By online I approached to the the college website and logged in into the website and I learnt the fee structures and accommodation in the college and sports and the circulation.

college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]
review_text:
We have a great celebration for each and every events in our college for example Ganesh chaturthi,Holi, Diwali,etc funded by Student affairs in which all student celebrate enthusiastically.
We also have 3 College fests- Aarohan- Sports fest
Advitiya - technical fest
Zeitgeist- cultural fest
In which students from all over the India come to our college to participate, compete and win prizes.I have got internship in my second year but unfortunately due to COVID19 I won't be able to do that.
But as I have heard, our college is only which calls companies for internships in second year.
Also we have internships for this year.
They also offer PPOs.
And also companies come for campus selection.

college_name: IIT Patna - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITP]
review_text: The highest package of 38. 00 Lakhs per annum has been offered by Microsoft, followed by DE Shaw Arcesium and CodeNation which has offered 33. 50, 32. 50 Lacs and 31 Lacs respectively. Apart from this, students have received tempting offers from Samsung, Mathworks, Goldman Sachs, MakeMyTrip, Sapient, Addverb, Optum, Cadence, Force Motors, ZS Associates, TCS R&D, Strand Life Science, LTI, LinkedIn, Saavn, Future First, Cognum, L&T ECC, Uber, L&T Heavy Engineering, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Aakash Institute and many more. Among the PSUs, ISRO and IOCL have visited the campus and offered job to the students.Anwesha, the annual techno-cultural fest of Indian Institute of Technology, Patna is held in the month of January???February every year. Footfall of 10000. Celesta is the annual Techno-Management Fest of IIT Patna. To promote technical and managerial enthusiasm amongst young and bright minds of our nation. Footfall of 5k. E- summit is the management fest of IIT Patna. Has a foot fall of 2k. IIT Patna also has a sports fest, tedx events, and many more branch fest.

college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]
review_text: Fee structure of all Nit's and IIT's are good. The colleges have semester fees around 1 lakh rupees but the college provide different fees slabs for different cateogaries based on their annual family income. If someone's total family income is less than 1 lakh they have to pay nothing. If family incomed is between 1 to 5 lakh they have to pay one third of total fees, And above 5 lakh family income they have to pay full fee. So it is very good.Its excellent, Focus on research is always there we do different type of practicals in our labs.We have lived our BTECH.Through AIEEE EXAM.WANNA DO B TECH. Through exam process i got good marks and got admission in btech EEE branch Electrical and Electronics.I Mom is in Electical line so they hold my intrest in this line.

college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr. Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology - [Vel Tech]
review_text: Teachers are all very qualified and educated and knowledgeable. they are always helpful to the students fir teaching as well as other required counseling.the teaching quality is appreciated. course curriculum is very relevant and practical and efforts are taken to make the students industry ready in terms of knowledge and experience etc.Top recruiting companies include BiG 4s, Reliance etc.A lot of students have got internship in banks around 70% of the students get well placed and the placement department is really helpful. Students for banks and other accounting jobs prefer this college and get well responses.

You have to firstly give the entrance exam of Amity university at their own campus and they give the result the same day . the admission process is very easy thats why anyone who has money gets admission easily . after that they interview the candidates and then they give the result the same evening . you have submit the semester fees then only you would get admission.Our college celebrate various events . Amity Noida fests are famous all over in Delhi - NCR . Many bollywood celebrities usually come to promote their films in our college . Sports and camping facilities are also very good . for the coding , if you are interested you would participate in various events .

college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University - [JIIT]
review_text:
The admission in the college is through JEE mains exam, there are 4 streams in the college for btech degree cse, ece, it and biotech there is an option to get into biotech through 12th marks as well. But for other streams only JEE rank is the criteria. I am a cse student, the genral cutoff for cse each year is around rank 57000, with some variations.
The admission process involves application for councelling and then and then appearing in person in the college on the alloted slot for reserving a seat in the college if eligible.The course curriculum is very great.
