For computer science, every year the course is updated and the popular technologies are added. Unlike most other colleges where course curriculum is so old that students loose their interest. Here at JIIT that is not the case.
Examination structure for each semester-
It consists of 3 theory exams (called T1,T2,T3) and 2 practical lab tests. T1 and T2 are of 20 marks each and T3 is of 35 marks the rest marks is for attendance and class response as well as home assignments.

college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]
review_text:
I got into this institute via JEE Mains, with a score of 144. There are 3-4 rounds of counselling, starting from May, and the academic year starts by end of July. I chose this college because: 1) It is more of a technology-oriented institute, most graduates go in for jobs in engineering rather than other fields like management
2) This college has a high number of students who get selected for Google Summer Of Code, and ACM ICPC, every year.
3) The placement statistics are great, with an average package of 10 lakh/annum, the highest being 40+ lakh. More than 90% of students who opt for interviews get placed.
4) It has a great coding/development culture, for budding Computer Science undergraduates.
As for why I chose Computer Science, it was because I had an ardent passion for computers and I take great interest in the subject. This institute is well known for this course.Campus Life is good in this college. There are various active clubs in the college, where one can hone their skills and interact with other people. Each club hosts their own flagship events, which are very well organised. Gender ratio is the college is alright, compared to other engineering colleges. The girls to boys ratio for each year is approximately 1:5.
Majority of students here hail from Jaipur city itself. Many of them also come from nearby places like Bhilwara, Ajmer, Alwar, Udaipur etc. Some students come from other states like Gujarat, Maharashtra, Delhi as well. Very few students hail from the south.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text: Here, the gender ratio is quiet unbalanced. The gender ratio is 1:10, ie for every 10 boys there is only one girl. However, this ratio might improve in future due to the 17% reservation policy introduced by the government.We have student Gymkhana who take care of all the needs of student, and put forward out demands and opinion to the administration.We also have various clubs such as art club known as Artfreaks, two dance societies known as LITM ans WTC, literary and debating clubs known as Chainika Sangh, dramatics club known as Abhay Dramatics Academy and a music club as well, known as Manthan.All these clubs are extremely active and have bagged various positions and prizes in Inter IIT as well as various other platforms. For sports activities, we have SAC, which also includes swimming pool, gym, badminton court, vollyball court, two big grounds, table tennis roometc.We also habe Robotics club.In CSE we have a well planned course curriculum having all the industry as well as research oriented subjects. The overall program is well divided into 8 semesters out of which the first two semesters are common.It means that in the first two semesters the classes are not divided on the basis of branch, but from third semester onwards classes will be held on basis of branch.Talking about the learning process, then here you have to learn everything on your own. The professors will provide the lecture plan and notes but you need to learn everything either from book or from online resources.Internship and placement scenario are pretty good here. Especially considering the branch, i.e CSE the placement is almost 100%. For branches like mining and chemical Engineering, regular industry visits are organised.

Annual Tech Fest ( Srijan) annual Fest ( cultural ) - Sanskriti, departmental Seminar / workshops of Chemical Engineering - ChemInnova, departmental Freshers, Departmental sports Fest - ChemAthlon, departmental Reunion - ChemBridge, departmental farewell - ChemAdiew, Union Freshers - UTURN, union annual Sports meet - ParodorSHE, Chayanat, Chayapath and also fests of respective clubs and societies.Campus life is the best. Fully freedom. you can do whatever you are interested. you can go for anything. Campus is fully free for students, no need to show any Id too to take enter in campus. Gender ratio in engineering is low while it's fine overall.labs are world class. Playground is maintained by CAB, so many clubs and societies ( with annual 5/- charge).

college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT]
review_text: Competitive entrance exam that is JEE Main to cleared with good percentile. Lectures are provided by highly qualified professors. There are many orientation programs are held in campus many are related for innovative ideas from the students and giving them ideas related to there branch. Students are exposed to latest industry practices through several industrial visits during their course. The confidence posed by the industries for our institute is indicated by the fact that 100% of our students are placed and are serving various leading global industries.There is 88 seats gender neutral and 18 fixed seats for females. Very good campus life and full of greenery. Student from each societies can be found in campus. You can find Muslim, Hindu, Christian and even Jainism. You can find SC, ST, OBC any category of student in the campus it can be rich or poor all are equal and cooperative. There is no place for politics in our only innovation is allowed in campus. As I mentioned earlier there is no ragging and racism in campus. There is sometime fun but that to in limits.

The college welcomes all students from different cultures, backgrounds and from all over India. Even international students are also a part of the university. The campus life is as good as it can be keeping you indulged throughout the semester. People with interest in sports can become part of college teams of different games. Various socities and clubs are present covering every sphere of literary, cultural and technical aspect. Regular elections are held to choose the Student Association.The entrance is through JEE Mains exam and one needs to apply on JAC Delhi. The admission process begins in end of June and works through seat allotment on the basis of ranks. A variety of courses are available to choose from as per interest. Once the seats are alloted, they are needed to be confirmed by going to the University. This being one of the best engineering institute after IITs, I chose it.

college_name: IIT Bombay - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITB]
review_text: The gender ratio is approximately 1 female per 10 males. Dorm parties are planned every semester officially, but it is held unofficially every week by the student community. Culture is very vast and diverse in its own way as students are from every corner of the country. Gender discrimination is a thing that you will never see anywhere on the campus. It's completely unbiased everywhere. There are specialized bodies on the campus for ensuring this kind of thing. Every discussion is held in a peaceful and engaging manner.As one of the finest institutions in the world, our college sets a very great environment for studying and it is the best of the professors who teach is to be more broad-minded and every teaching phenomenon is supplemented with a research experience. Industrial visits are held for students but internships are more favorable in the institute.

The faculty is very well qualified but some of them lag the teaching skill they know the concept but aren't able to explain efficiently. They are qualified from very reputed institutes like Indian institute of technology and iisc and mostly they are very guiding and supporting.They have strong alluminu network as the number of students studying here are very much so you can find aluminis in every place of the country working in almost every organisation, this is one of the best parts about this college.

I got the admission by giving an entrance exam called LPU-NEST.
Factors made me choose this institution:-
1) Infrastructure
2) Diversity
3) Placement
4) Scholarship
5) Anti ragging
First you need to apply online for the entrance test. After that you'll get an admit card on which you will get your examination center. After the exam you will get results. Print the result and take necessary documents (Original and Xerox) to the nearest lpu office situated in your city.They will verify all the documents and based on your results scholarship will be given. You can get your queries clear by asking them.You need to pay 10,000 to secure your admission. The mode of payment is Paytm,DD or Card.Cash is not acceptable at the lpu office. Cash is only accepted when you pay fee in the campus.
After that you will be given a date on which you need to go to the campus.On the next day you need to go to the admission office for document verification.There will be induction classes of 3 days where you will get a lot of friends, they'll take you to city tour induction classes are not mandatory.In lpu most of the students are boys.Even in CSE department we can barely see girls in the classrooms.Fashion designing and agriculture department have the most number of girls.
Lpu is not behind for the extra curricular activities,labs,sports etc.There are two big events one India and one World conducted every year in LPU.In addition to that there are so many events, workshops conducted every day by some department or student organizations.
Lpu is an University with 0% ragging and with 0% alcohol free.I didn't see any fights, ragging so far in the campus.Any such indiscipline activity leads to UMC case (suspend from classes and scholarship cut).This is how the management putting everyone under control.
There are no religious flights, racism in campus.It is a campus with diversity.Students from every corner of India as well as from foreign countries come here for studies.

Online Application form will be issued from January 2020
Merit list candidates based on merit performance in 10+2 The merit list candidates will be called for counselling The fact that a candidate has qualified and has been called for the counselling does not guarantee admission to him / her. This depends upon the performance in the GDPI and the availability of seats
Selection list will be prepared based on the marks secured in higher secondary school examination, and the performance in Group Discussion & Personal InterviewOur college gives equal importance to extracurricular activities there are many competition and events conducted every week in which students can take part and win exciting prizes. Whereas Lab facilities are extremely good
In our college there are two events conducted every year in which one is the sports and cultural event called vitopia and the other is the technical event known as vtapp. In both these events various competition are held and huge prizes are given to the students.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text: Gender ratio Girl/Boy = 1/8 .i.e, there are 14% girls present in college. This 14% is said to be taken upto 20% in a succession of 8 years i.e. till 2026. Apart from academics, this college also works on overall development of students. There are many clubs present in college, where one can nurishes his/her talent simultaneous with academics. A huge platform is available for student in sports. The college faculty work very hard to bring the college beyond its potential limits.One has to clear JEE Mains exam first and must have to come in the cut-off range. After this, he/she has to appear for JEE ADVANCED exam. (Yhe syllabus of JEE MAINS and ADVANCED ecam papers is the course of 11yh and 12th class)The cut-off marks for jee advanced paper is announced after 3-4 weeks. And on yhe basis of this a rank list is made by athourities. Then 7 round cunselling is held for college selection. And admission process begins.

Gender ratio is almost 70% boys and 30% girls. We have a huge campus of 80acre. We have facility for every sports in our college. With two huge grounds and separate basement for indoor sports. We also have special IIOT and Machine learning lab. Every year our department (others departments also) organises inter college competition separately on prototype designing that will be helpfull for mankind and many more robotics event during fest also. Our campus is huge and only our college accomodate 4000 students every day. There are also 3 other colleges and a school of Heritage group separately.We have average placement record in our college. With average LPA of 4 lakh. Many IT companies visit our college and we have off campus facility. So many other IT companies can came for recruitment. Almost 80% students gets placed within the completion of course in our college. Many Core startup based companies also visit our college. IT based companies such as TCS, WIPRO, COGNIZENT, TECH MAHINDRA, MICROSOFT(recruted very few students), AMAZON(only 2 students got chance) and many more.

college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management - [ABVIIITM]
review_text: The annual fees of the institute is little expensive as Rs. 1, 72, 000 is a big amount for students who come from financial weak families and the institute doesn't provide any type of discounts for the families having annual income less than Rs 1, 00, 000. So students are forced to take education loan.The college conducts ourora - Cultural, Management Festival biggest cultural fest of central India. The ourora 2020 was having prizes around 20 lakhs and celebrities like Mohit Chauhan and Olly Esse also performed. Infotsav Technical Fest of ABV-IIIT, which conducts technical events.

The course syllabus is periodically updated to reach the technical standards required for the present industries/companies.Institute has well equipped,modern labs for each department to improve the practical knowledge of students.All the faculties are highly qualified and friendly and are always available to clear the doubts of students or help them in their projects.It is one of the top 10 nits in the country.Its palcement statistics are good.The institute provides research based education to improve the professional,technical skills of the student.Its faculties are very experienced and highly qualified.

To be precise, there is no campus in our college. It's just a 6 floor building. Very less extracurricular activities are available. This is a huge drawback of our college. Labs are nice. There are sporting events in our college but that doesn't take place in our college. It takes place in some field or something like that. Competitions happen and they are excellent.Total program fees is around 5 lakh. College accepts all modes of payment. There is another process of getting admission i. e. Through Management quota. Here you have to pay some donations in order to get admission in the college. Other than that they take 1200 rs exam charges per semester.

In this university placement is very good. If you want to go in Research area then it's excellent.
So many lab is there inside the university. In college so many projects is given to students. Hult prize is also going in college. For GATE special class is taken by professor.It is a very good college. It's all India ranking in engineering is 13th. Even it is better than many IIT. Fee structure is very less. To join this university you have to gain good rank in WBJEE exam. Rank should be less than 1000. After getting participate in counciling.

Many cultural events held on a regular basis. Different clubs in our college do several events. The college fest is youthopia which held in the month of November. It is a 3-day fest. Big celebrities come to the fest. Different bands and teams from other colleges take part.The scholarship is given on the basis of marks of 12th and jee mains score during admission and further scholarships are provided on the basis of marks obtained in the semesters following scholarship criteria. Different scholarships are also provided to siblings and girls.

Our college has a large multiporpose ground also alongside the ground a gym is located and also a tennis court is present. For shuttlers there are two wooden courts present here. Also there are table table tennis boards and carrom boards are provided by the Management.There are various technical and non technical events held throught the year There is a cultural event named pleiades which is held in even semester. In this event a celebrity is invited to perform It has DJ night. Students response is pretty good for these events.

The teaching faculty of the course are selected through an entrance exam, many of the teachers are on contract, while some are permanent. The department consist of an HOD and assistant professor for each subject, theory and laboratory. the teachers are quite qualified some of them even holding PHD degrees. My opinion of the faculty will be poor. most of the teachers do not indulge with deep involvment in the subject and explanation of the topic, most of them only teach how to pass for the exam and explanation is really bad. Discipline is also not maintained, numericals are hardly understandable, No relevance with real life scenarios. they ask for assignments which is joke, you have to fill irrelevant pages by copying each other and just fill pages and write blindly which will be bundled up and probably never open. Most of the teachers excluding the HOD and few others teach in native language and they explain mechanical without involving digital picture or diagramsThe process includes by appearing for the JEE exam. If you attain a certain cutoff for this college you might get admission. There is no interview process, after you get the cutoff rank you have to verify documents from PU on mentioned date and register yourself. I chose mechanical engineering because I could attain a seat only in this field due to my curoff rank. After getting selected the JAC panel will fix a date for verification of all engineering colleges affiliated to PU where your seat will be allotted and all documents and id proofs need to be verified, Even hostels may be alloted on the same day. After verification you have to submit the fees online through SBI pay and pay the printed reciept along with registration to the required staff. This college offers engineering in 4 fields which are mechanical, civil, electronics and computer science. The highest no of students who get placed are from computer science department

college_name: IIT Tirupati - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITTP]
review_text: The extracurricular activities are really awesome because there will be a active participation in the co curriculuar activities so the college staff also allow and they will encourage us to participate in the extra curriculuar activities. They will also conduct all sports games every year by making groups and there will award the overall performance trophy also.Placements and job opportunities in our college are given in the last year. Placements are also given through private limited IT company and foreign companies. The college offers us internships in the final year. Our seniors had gone to arcgate and zoomio & pc solution company for internship, they had very good results for internship in six months.

Our college hosts India's largest multifest. VIDYUT. It is conducted by student and a team of faculty. It hosts technical and non technical events. Workshops, Pro- shows, Choreonite, DJ. etc
Other events like Onam festival, Pongal, diwali, kalotsavam, sports day, etc, are conducted.It comes around 3 lakh rupees for a year, including tuition fees and hostel fees. Hostel accommodation and food is good. College campus is vast and airy. Fee is reasonable as other colleges, of not this caliber charge 2-3 per annum.

Technovanza is the technical fest of VJTI college with about 50, 000 people coming from all over the Maharashtra. 150+ colleges participate in this event. Technovanza is the only technical event next to IITs Techfest in Mumbai. Pratibimb is annual Cultural fest with 10, 000 peoples and 59+ colleges participating. Enthusia is annual sports festival. SNC is a management fest by Ecell committee.Vjti is in the heart of Mumbai. It enjoys participation of big compamies for placements. L&T, Tata, HCC, HDIL are few companies which visit every year for core branches. Apart from these Samsung, Goldman Sachs, Apple, Microsoft also come in for Comps and IT dept. Internships are provided in the 3 year of your course through college interviews and screening test.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: The course structure is very nice here. I am currently pursuing Electronics and Computer field which majors in Electronics and minors in Computers. We have 8 semesters in which 4 semesters we are taught Electronics and the other 4 we are taught Computers. The Labs are high tech and I love how everything works. We have 2 main exams, i. e. Mid semester and End semester exams. Followed by Lab practicals and unit tests.The college provides placements and Job opportunities. Highest package here is around 40 Lakhs per annum. Thapar college also provides Some internships and stipend can go upto 1-2 Lakh per month. DEShaw, Amazon, Samsung, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS and many more companies come and give placements to students.

Jadavpur University is a hive of extracurricular activities. Labs are okayish. The sports activities include- cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, table tennis, chess and a lot more. There are clubs for mountaineering, music, entrepreneurship, writing skills etc. The gender ratio is not an issue in the college. Anyone can play anything. This is one of the best things in here. Politics is a healthy practice here. Not the politics we know out there. This politics includes knowing different ideologies and creating a good background to see the things happening in the outside world.If you are admitted through the entrance exam the government provides you an reammbarsment of 35000.The actual College fee is 78000 removing this 35000 we have to pay 43000, this criteria is for OBC students.The OC students admitted through the entrance have to pay the whole college fee 78000.There is another category called management in which students have to pay around 4 Lakhs donation and the full academic fee.For SC and ST students there will be no fees.

We celebrate many festivals and the main one is the Annual Meet. It is the time where many competitions are held and it is held in the spring semester. Inter-hostel Marchpast is the main one of them. Some other are wall magazine, cricket, running, kho-kho, khabadi, long jump, high jump, drama, Western chorus, dance and so on.Feasible BCOM is a three year course and the fee structure is less comparatively to other courses the fee structures is Haa follows In the first year it???s 22000 to 25000 In the second year it???s 20000 to 2500
And in the last year it???s same has 2 and year And we need to pay extra for the college uniform.

Gravitas(Technical event)
Technical rounds. Great competitions on technical rounds. A large no of colleges come to participate. Goes for 2 days. Riveria (Cultural event)
Big star-studded event Bollywood and foreign celebrities perform along with lots of games and fun.Very good. Exam patterns are also quite interesting. Tricky and brainstorming questions are asked which makes it more interesting. Courses are quite in-depth and it makes it more interesting with video teaching and guest lectures arranged by the college.

In this college every faculty are done their Ph.D in IIT's as well as in abroad. They have good teaching skills and lot of experiences. Management conducts a interview class like to evaluate their teaching skills by students before the faculty join here. According to students evaluation management will acquire the faculty members.Academic fee is feasible but the Exam fee is some how expensive. But they will the exam through the digital pads. For hostellers students, for food is little bit expensive. They will provide separate food for other and country students and the our country students.

Course Curriculam is better.Their is a semester system examination. Every semester they conduct three examination(Mid semester, Internal examination and end semester).The faculties are highly qualified.There are many labs and the labs are nice.There are many research students.If you want to do any project undet any faculty while studying your course you can do.There are many events.Famous events are KIIT FEST, KIIT MUN, TEDx.Recently they organise KHELO INDIA AIU GAMES.In KIIT FEST there are many cultural and technical events.Every year they conduct two-three times foreign guest lecture programme in every department.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: I am in Electronics and Computers branch, it is a pretty good branch as if offers both electronics and computers, we get dual options for placement too. The course consists of 60% electronics and 40% computers. This is my second year and so far I can say that this is an amazing branch. In the first year we studied all the basic subjects like Physics, chemistry, mathematics, C++ etc. From the second year onwards we started to dig in our core subjects like Analog electronics, digital electronics, etc. One great thing I find about my course is that It also offers me to study subjects like Manufacturing Processes, in this subject we get an experience of field work which we expect only from mechanical engineers. We were taught how to do welding, milling and many other. We also have to make projects like building a line follower robot, mangonel, and in 3rd year we have to make a cap stone projects too.I gave JEE exam, scored average marks in that. I also have other exams like COMEDk, entrance exams for colleges like Manipal, VIT, etc. Thapar University take admissions on the basis of your JEE rank. I also cleared VIT and MANIPAL. I checked NIRF ranks and saw that Thapar has was on 19th rank and others were in 30s or something. I was offered Electronics and Computers in Thapar, it is a pretty good branch as if offers both electronics and computers, we get dual options for placement too. This branch made me make my mind for joining Thapar Institute.

Annual cultural festival named VITopia has a huge hype in around cities. Many celebrities were invited many performers, inter college and intra college competitions were conducted. The two day fest has many great performances. Also many nearby college students atted this event. Annual technical fest named Vitaap is also a great palce to learn many new things. Many project developers and on field workers and scients come and share their views on recent technology trends and share their ideas.I didn't get any scholarships or loans for my education. But there are few scholarships provided by the University for the University topper. Also there is a program called as STAR where two students from each district are given completly free education and hostel facility. Those two students should persue their intermediate level from government junior college and top in the final exams.

The placement of our college is very impressive almost all the students get placed in their required companies and forms college placement is very good our college also provide internships now I am a student of 2nd year at the end of this semester I am thinking of doing 1 internship are college also helps to provide intimus and a very good companies of forms placement group for college is which country in his name the name itself Harcourt Butler technical University is very importantThe faculty of our college is very supportive and they are interested in their particular course so there is a lot learn from them apart from the knowledge they also provide some confidence achieve something in the future it is also experienced the profeesionals are very experienced the way of teaching of officers is quite different which makes students is li understandable where is also extra classes that also helps to clear the doubts.

Course curriculum is not much hectic. There will be three mid semester examinations and one semester end examination per semester. The average of two mid semester examinations out of three is the main eligibility criteria for semester end examination. Some of the days will be hectic according to our extra curricular activities.Placements and job opportunities varies with different branches. Different branches have different percentage of placements per year. It all varies with IT based branches and hardware based branches. Some branches have a very great placement record whilst some don't have much.

Yes it provides internship as currently I'm a second year student I haven't got an opportunity yet. As I've heard from my seniors they provide internship opportunities at the start of the 3 year. Many good companies come to collegeAdmission is through Comedk and on merit basis. Electronics and Instrumentation course is a nice course with good faculty and it's quite an old course so it's pretty well developed with teachers having good amount of experience.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text:
Many companies offer job opportunities in our college. They provide the best jobs in the city to the students who got selected in top companies. Student has to prepare for gpat exam for Masters. An internship is an opportunity offered by an employer to potential employees, called interns, to work at a firm for a fixed period of time. Interns are usually undergraduates or students, and most internships last between a month and three months.B pharma course has a very good future and has more job opportunities.
50% of seats is through CET and 50% is payment seats and whoever comes first and are able to pay admission fees can enter. If you choose to pursue B Pharma, you would be an important part of the healthcare system and provide medication for management of various illnesses. A bachelor's degree in pharmacy will provide stable employment throughout your career.

If you really want to come to this college so the first thing I will suggest that don't make too many expectations of having a wonderful hostel ya college life. If you are joining this institute uh need to work hard and due to more restrictions, enjoyment is quite less as compare to other colleges. otherwise, in terms of academics, it's good.Actually, I didn't take the loans so I don't have any experience with that. But I know education loans are provided by banks easily for such type of institution. If we talk about scholarship as such so if your rank in vitee exam is excellent then you will get otherwise no

Course structure of my stream is very good, we are going step by step like in 1 St year we learned object oriented programming And in 2nd year we learnt python programming and algorithms. Exam structure is also good, we have mid term exams as mcq based and end term exams as mcq and theory based. In mcq questions negative marking is also there. Their labs are in not bad condition. They are moderate.Their are many section in CSE branch, so after every semester our faculties got changed, after doing PhD or during pursuing PhD, you can apply as a faculty. We have 3 lecture or 1 tutorial in a week of a subject, in tutorial faculty ask about our doubts and solve more examples and related stuff.

The faculty in my college are well qualified and teach with ppt as well as board and makes the class interesting. Not only this they are always there to clear my doubts relating to the projects. They teach us the correct way to be implemented in college and organise many of the industrial visits so that we could get a glimpse of how the work is done in profeesional institutions and companies. The teachers give us digital assignments which check the caliber of each student and keeps us motivated towards the course.The seniors in my college are very helpful. They are always there to help us out with what ever difficulties we are having with our course or any other matter like placements and internships. There is no word called ragging in my college everyone lives with peace nad harmony and even we enjoy all the matches like cricket football together on the big screens in hostel

The teachers are ready always for any kind of doubt. They provide us with their email address and phone number. They reply as soon as they see and solve our doubts. The same is the case with the senior students. They are also as helpful as the teachers and help and guide in every possible way.The college is the best. I am very happy to get admission to such a university and getting such amazing friends and teachers. I have no regret in getting admission here but am satisfied with every activity occurring including the studies and the extra co-curricular activities.

More than a positive we have lots of negative things in our institute. I definitely not recommend this college to anyone. They are completely money minded they will make you satisfied to join in the institute but after once joining here and paying fee they won't even think about students and their life's. You can go through YouTube search about our college and you can see what's exactly happening in our college.No fee structure depends upon the performance on LPU nest. without any Scholarship the annual fee is 209000. but with scholarship it get reduced to even 89000 per annum. Fee structure is feasible with the facilities provided by the University. Labs are fine classrooms are maintained with AC availability. No extra charges are put by the university.

college_name: IIT Bombay - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITB]
review_text: We have sports facilities were well we can each type of game here on campus, there are a lot of extracurricular activities inside the campus such as for fitness, social cause and also some motivational speakers, dramatic related, music. Gender equality is fair enough we have girls boys ratio of 3/10 also we have cell-like Saathi to motivate students such as bisexual or homosexual and each student has its own identity here.Yes, our college provides internships to the students from the Second Year(b. tech) onwards and placement is also among the highest in Indian engineering colleges. our college is best known for Computer science engineering because it offers placement to the students as they are getting paid for 5cr to some student in campus placement.

Placements on paper seems very good but as I'm still studying I've no idea how'd the scenario be looking like in an year or two. College provides Internships but the stipend is not much. This year Adobe gave the highest package of 40LPA. Also Microsoft was in the list of the companies that visited in Day 0There are a lot of events to keep you occupied throughout the year the biggest being the KIITFEST and other subsidary events falling within every one or two months gaps as it is a University so every school has its own fest and there are special events on festivals even for the international students

Campus life is enjoyable and filled with lots of activities. My college is filled with so many clubs to encourage students it's like "you name a talent we have a club to develop and enhance it". Extracurricular activities like NSS, NCC and over 20 clubs for different things like for dance we have three clubs, one western, one for classical and one for folk like this our college is filled with fun.Our college held biggest cultural fest in Bengaluru utsav for 3 days.The infrastructure of our college is impressive. High quality sports infrastructure attracts everyone. In my college one entire floor is reserved for library which includes digital library, books for undergraduates, separate chambers for post graduates, good maintainance and much more. The wi-fi is available all over the campus in very good speed.The labs include all required latest and old equipments in excellent condition.

It is very relevant always adapting and modifying with the new technology and methods of teaching and learning. They also don't believe in the fact to make people sloch or work hard but believe in smart work where most of the assignments can be done on computers and submitted as soft copyWe have to buy a form for registration had to fill the form online wait for the list to be out then they take interview in rounds after short listing students we come to know the people selected and then we have to pay the fees or the first installment to confirm our admission.

Fee structure is feasible because they provide such a good scholarship and according to highest scholarship, the fee structure is around 70K per year where you got 60K scholarship per semester. There is additional fee for exam and which is around 200 per year. The college also provide student loan for making students comfortable to take the admission and make their future better.Gender ratio is equally likely. In LPU, you will find many workshops based on your interest and there is so much cultural society based events, also many clubs organize competitions in every field so that student can learn and ready for future. There is no such discrimination regarding anything even rac, religion, politics, etc. Every student treated equally here.

I have the Wbjee-Jelet exam (JELET is only for lateral enteries otherwise only Wbjee), it an entrance exam that is conducted by west bengal board. I took admission in IEM,Kolkata because It is well recognised college having good ranking around 101 all over India. I have ook admission in IEM kolkata on 20th of September 2019. Addmission Procedure is simple, 1) Give Wbjee exam. 2) Choose IEM according to your rank.( As there are upper and downs limit of marks. 3) choose your department.Good labs that helps in practical gaining of knowledge. Teachers are also helpful as well trained. Student are also very helpful, if they are senior then they will show you path and if they are junior then they will co-operate with you.Placement record is very much good compare to other MAKAUT affiliated colleges. 24*7 online as well as offline liberary. Aslo it is a full wifi campus.

college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text: Placements & jobs had been really nice in the campus for this department though it has a bit degraded from last year, but is still nice. On campus placements occur, quite renowned companies recruit students. And the college offers summer internship for mainly 2nd year students where the students are involved in research. The stipend goes like 5k a month.This college & fests are the two most happening things. Fests & programs keep happening round the year. Sports fest, technical fest, cultural fest all happen in an academic year. But it's quite sad to say that cultural fest has not happened that much nicely for last 2 years due to some national emergency. Still hoping to see our cultural fest.

college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text: Curriculum is now changed and is more nice than what it was earlier. Exams basically consist of mid sem & end sem with internals be it faculty giving you assignment or taking your class test. For a chemical engineering student core subjects mostly came in 3rd year but for now they will start early.Placements occur on campus & many companies arrive in the campus & recruit students. Our college also provides internship in research area with stipend of almost 10k total. The experience of internships is something very different, you learn so much from it.

college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text: Sharing my opinion on course curriculum is that it's fine but is now revised for the upcoming batches from this year itself. Being in chemical engineering, it's the most lite branch amongst all. The lectures take place from 8:30-12:30, 5days a week and then labs from 2-4/2-6/4-6 depending on your year, 2/3 days a week and all that depends on what year, branch & subjects you're having.Fests in a college are the best platform to shape the extra curricular activities of students. Cultural, technical, sports fest all take place and a committee for all is made that gives you management skills too. Not only this even competitions for drama, art, music also take place.

college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text: Yes our college provide internship. Stipend is around 25k. Placements in our branch is less as very less Number of companies comes for recruitment.I dont know Much about college internship as I am not that much in technicalityCourse Structure is good but one thing needs to be add is that we all should be also make aware that how far this things have been reached.Labs are not that much interesting, Things should be made much engaging and interesting

college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text: Placements for chemical engineering are nice. Companies like reliance, L&T etc. arrive in the campus & recruit students. Even the college gives research internship to 3 students from each department under faculties which further receive stipend of around 10,000/- for 2&1/2 months.Exams happen like mid sem & end sem without any break in between the consecutive exams in both of them. You may consider this to be a difficult thing but it's not difficult instead it's like it ends up so early & yu needn't wait for the next one, it comes suddenly.

college_name: IIT Dharwad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITD]
review_text: Near about 45 students from our course got placed last year. About 30% of the students from our course got an internship at our college. The average salary package offered in our course ranges between 12 lakhs-20 lakhs LPA. Placements in our college are not good, but dean is trying to provide the best placements. IIT will need few more years to provide the best placements possible.The WALMI Campus of IIT Dharwad is the best among the newer IITs. There are facilities for all academic and welfare needs of the students. There are facilities for ebook learning, sports facilities, canteen, library, internet facility and security as well as workshops and seminars.

college_name: IIT Goa - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITG]
review_text: Due to the worldwide pandaemic, college is closed now.The pioneers' batch is still in its third year right now. So, there are no placements conducted yet. However, we are expecting really good placements as the mentor institute is IIT Bombay. The first placement session will be conducted in 2020. Students have applied to various famous companies like CERN, etc.Here, the candidates before applying for B.tech courses in our college, should sit for JEE Advanced and also a pass in 10+2 examination or equivalent examination is required with a minimum of 75%. Both the scores with be take into consideration before a student makes it to the final list.

The college has it's own Techfest called Innovaction and Also it's cultural fest named IEMpACT. Both of the fest gathers huge number of participants and the competition is on a supreme level. Also there are many paper presentation events . And many conferences where foreign delegates from ivy league colleges come to give students knowledge on the latest hot topics.The labs are equipped with the latest technology and is at par with the current scenarios and requirements. Their is a sports room for the students to play after college providing with table tennis and other indoor games. There are 2 basketball grounds and one volleyball ground.

They have large number of sports complexes in entire campus.each sports complex consist of the swimming pool,gym,and all the indoor game facilities.and they take very less amount for that.they have a large cricket,hockey,football ground and coaches are also there.basketball and volleyball courts are also thereI gave the kiit entrance exam and after the result through kiit merit list I got admission.they also provide scholarship to the students securing below 1000 rank on kiit entrance exam.and the branches are provides according to the rank of the students in kiit entrance exam

college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]
review_text: Campus life is far more active than any other engineering college with a number of events going on every semester. Technical activities include Pecfest, a number of hackathons, a number of technical events these are bigger and highly competitive with the pecfest being the most famous fest of North Indian colleges. Cultural events are organised during Pecfest and other important festivals ,these include events like dance, singing, glitterati etc. There are a number of other competitions as well such as Parliamentary Debating, Model united nations etc. Apart from these college also holds expert talks for the students. The Pecfest is a famous college fest of PEC and a see a huge number of participations from college students all over the country. Apart from this there are a number of events going on all the year round.there are a large number of companies visiting the college for core as well as non-core engineering profiles like finance, management etc. Approximately about 80% of the students gets placed.  The students are placed as per their calliber and interest the placement process is open, with the companies visiting throughout the placement year to select students and the placement committee is hard working to help the students in best possible way and get them placed in a good career.

college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology
review_text: The departments provide their students with the necessary skills in their respective fields through a fascinating course structure and industrial exposure, for five days a week. There are many practical workshops to give students enough industrial experience. Moreover, recently, to give students a better industrial exposure, the focus of teaching has quite changed from a  bookish manner to a more practical approach. Course structures have been updated to provide essential skills required by the Industry. Faculties here are also quite experienced and hard-working, one of my favorite professors is Dr. Pratik Chattopadhyay of the department of CSE.The Training & Placement Office, IIT (BHU) Varanasi facilitates the process of placement of students passing out from the Institute by collaborating with leading organizations and institutes in setting up of internship and training program of students.The placement season runs through the course of the year commencing the last week of July through to March. Every year around 200 big industrial and tech giants like Google, Microsoft, Samsung, TATA, Uber  recruits students from our college for internships and jobs.

My Campus life so far has been one of the cherishable experiences. I have enjoyed every day of the journey to the fullest and can say that it's the best, full of ups and downs, refreshment and challenges. The college organises several events throughout the year with two major Headlining events, annual technical fest Tecnoesis and cultural fest Incandescence. The technical fest " Tecnoesis " Brings a huge no of events and competition with a huge no. of participants across and beyond the college.coding competitions like Hackathon, nibble are conducted online and brings huge participants. Robotics competition like sumo wars, robowar etc excited huge participants and audience as well.competition like smart city exhibition, Bech ke dikhao, who would be next CEO, IPL auction various quizzes are organised. Closing event called spark night is a cultural night which brings big fame from Bollywood. Annual cultural event "Incandescence" Is also one of the flagship cultural events of college which helds various cultural events and seminar by many big techie and renowned alumni. Competition like indie lake(a music competition), NITs MUN, cultural events like comedy night, kavi-sammelan, ramp walk etc. are held. Many Bollywood fame singers and renowned archestra team comes for live performances . My college has an average class of infrastructure, neither too modern nor too primitive. Some Building, classrooms, hostels are old, but some are built new and equipped with all latest technologies and facilities. Like my college has Asia's biggest library named as "Dr. APJ  Abdul kalam learning and resource center". It has huge collection of Books, journals, research papers etc. , study space, wifi, online learning resources etc. College also has a separate ground and kits an for all the sports like cricket, Basketball, volleyball, lawn Tennis, football. It also has a Badminton court, several table tennis boards in each hostels and many more! Coming to lab infrastructures, most of the equipments and apparatus are latest and updated, and sufficient in numbers. College also has a huge auditorium for conducting several events, and mass seminars.

The nirf ranking and the civil engg department I opted is among the first branch to be taught here.  Also the placements are decent. Since the PSU also visit the campus. The ambience of the college is very calm and soothing. Its beyond the chaos of the cities and full of naturely love. The various departments have their well equipped  buildings. There are recreational means as well in the college. The best part is we dont need to travel to the town to purchase stuff. We have 12 fair price shops already in the campusOur tech fest Tecnoesis is the second largest tech fest of the north east India and sk does our cultural fest Incandescence. We have participants from all over India. Recently we had Incandescence and the centre of attraction was the concert of Darshan Raval  and the audition ls of world hip hop

We have 2 big anual fest one is cultural and other is tecnical other than those we have small fest like branch freshers and freshers party, spring fest and many more.our anual fest fest are biggest fests of North eastern India with huge participants from our college and from different parts of India.We get very large no of companies for recruitment in our college.as per our branch we get 100% placement some students will also get 2-3 jobs with very good salary of average 12-14 lpa which is very good and we have highest package of 32lpa

Till now, I'm satisfied with my campus life.  The college organise two major event in a year, each in odd and even semester.  It organise Technical event named Techniche. It's a 4 day event, in which different technical events like coding competition like Hackathon , nibble , robotics competition like sumo wars, robo wars, Terrain traders, etc are organised. Competition focussing on enhancement of entrepreneurship skills like Bech ke dikhao, what if u were the CEO, crack the job , Business quizzes etc are organised.  A cultural event named spark night is also organised in the last day of Techniche marking the  end of Technical event.  In summer semester( jan -may) annual cultural event called Incandescence is organised, which features various different cultural events. It's also a four days event, which features events like confrenza in which renowned allumuni and experienced Tech expert  interract and share tips with students. Event like indie lake is a singing competition in which singers from different college participates. Cultural evening also features some of the renowned singers, poets, Rock Band teams from Bollywood, comedians, mister and misses Assam,  and various different events. Apart from them, many online competition are held, which brings a huge no of participants from different colleges of Assam and few other state. Course curriculum is regularly revised according to the need of companies, and competitive exams like GATE and ESE. The academic rules and regulations are also student friendly and focussed.we are   regularly given opportunity to attend various seminars organised by industrial and training executive under TEQP III. Faculty team is mixture of both Young , newly joined as well as Highly experienced faculties. Mostly they hold PHD from different IITs and NITs and other reputed university of India and abroad.  Faculties like Wasim Arif, prof. Faisal A. Talukdar, shantanu roy, Taimur Khan, Kaushik Guha are Highly experienced and exceptional in teaching.

college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]
review_text: The course curriculum is relevant for someone appearing for GATE .We do have some technical trainings and industrial tour to get some real life experience. We are taught about the subjects in practical in the labs that are equipped with most recent technology.We host an annual techfest event which is considered as one of the best fest in Asia.There are a lot of events in which people participate from all over the world.The star night is just amazing.

college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]
review_text: Pec has always been one of the most esteemed colleges and it was my dream to get into this college. The faculty here is great and the number of projects taken up by teachers is also great. Teachers also involve and promote the students to take part in projects. The technical societies are very active which provide extra exposure to students. Extra curricular activities are in large number. The cultural societies such as dramatics dance and acting have a great reach all throughout the north Indian theatre circuit. The festivals are attending by huge number of people owing to the fact that the college can accommodate large no of students.

There are 3 main fests celebrated in our University.
They are
1. Colosseum
It is a sports fest whose duration is 3 days. It's an intra college fest. So, other college students are invited and made competitions with them.
2. Daksh
It is a technical fest whose duration is 3 days. Many technical companies come over here and they'll conduct workshops on various titles.
3. Kuruksastra
It is a cultural fest and its duration is 3 days. Other college cultural teams are invited for a performance on our stage. Many celebrities are invited for their performance.We have to apply for admission through online portal. We need to enter our syllabus( CBSE or State Board) then our 12th grade marks. If you've written JEE Mains, you need to enter your JEE Mains score. They will normalize your score and they'll release rank list. Then they call for admission counseling according to your rank.

I like engineering that too in civil so i choose psg college & i got seat in merit and psg is one among best institutions in tamilnadu so i think i'm also be a part of it and addmission is on merit base only few seats are only available' to become an entrepreneur is my ambition & i believe dreams come true on this platformKiriya 2020,intrams, nebula, Enext and so far many technical events are conducted by our institutions and create a greate platform for the hidden talents among the students and to grow Many new ideas of the students are found and recognises for their effect and all these are organised by the students

college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]
review_text: PEC is one of the oldest government college in India, heading to complete its 100 years in 2021. PEC is a big brand name and the quality of education truly proves this. There are improved placement scenario in the college every year, it is one of the primary reason I took admission in this college. Here are top companies to recruit the graduates at handsome packages. Also, the environment to study is great, internship interviews etc.  The thing I like the most is the Pre Placement Training that college conducts in 4th semester . It is a great move for preparing one for difficult interviews and how to handle them. They introduce students from resume writing to hoe to handle interview questions.Another thing is the support of the faculty is great do not matter which branch faculty you approach all are ready to guide students at any level. I will honestly say that Metallurgy was not my first preference instead I wanted to become a civil engineer but couldn't make that, and because I was getting Metallurgy in college like PEC so I took admission in the course and now I am satisfied with my decision, developing interest in this fieldIn addition to good academics college promotes sports too. PEC each year in April organizes Annual sports meet, and witness a number of participation from students, also events like Inter branch Cricket, volleyball  and table tennis competitions are organized. Besides this college has a well maintained Gymnasium, football ground, Cricket ground, Atheletic ground. Wi-fi is also provided by college named PEC wifi, and what if i tell you , it has a great speed and you can surf so smoothly all day, surely one of the best things. Library is also well maintained we have 3 reading halls including 2 AC halls, there are sufficient amount of books for each branch, also at the start of the semester a book bank opens from where one can issue books for whole semester. The labs are also updated, by the time new machines keep coming, and lab assistants are also aware and helpful if one is interested to know and learn skills.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text:
Placements are really good.
One among the best placements for CSE and Earth Science branches.
CSE avg placement is around 20LPA
Almost 100% placement in both.
In third year we get internships with almost 50% students getting industry internship.
Stipend for internship to industries ranges from 50k to 2Lacks.
Some students also intern at foreign university / industry.Numerous state Government, NGO, Industrial, Central Government provide scholarship for almost all students.
MCM Scholarship is availed by most.
Whereby entire tuition FEES is waived off.
SC/ST students need not pay any fees.
Interest free lones are sponsored by government of India (Vidhya Lakshmi Loan)

Campus life is highly supportive. Starting from gym labs swimming pools badminton court volleyball court basketball court hockey ground cricket ground football ground and many others are well maintained. Different kind of societies are also there. KIIT has done meaning opportunities for the students to show their extravaganza.Yes, the college provides transparency in fee breakdown. college_name: IIT Bombay - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITB]
review_text:
I Liked Science that's why I choose Engineering.
I choose IIT Bombay because it's number one in India and also because the connectivity from Mumbai to the rest of India is very good.
Well, you have to clear an examination called JEE. first, you have to clear the JEE mains exam around 10 to 12 lakh students give the exam and from that 2 lakh 2.5 lakh are selected for JEE advanced. Then you have to give JEE advanced examination and based on your rank you can choose the stream and college you want to go the better the rank the better your chances are you getting the branch you want or the institute you wantThere are around 15 to 17 percent girls, it is compulsory for all the students to live in a hostel, there are many clubs including dancing dramatics swimming weight lifting it is cultural and sports group and also group named Sathi for the LGBTQ community. there is a little bit of politics in the institute also because there are elections which are held every year for student body presidents but it is within the institute and there is no predominant political parties and influence from outside also.

The college life is fun with lots of scope for cultural activities. All sorts of extracurriculars are practiced by the students and the management is supportive towards those who bring accolades.
There are several academic clubs as well, but seeing as how girls are not allowed to work late nights in the college buildings that thourows a constraint.
The main festival vitopia is a fun-filled extravaganza and guests are invited (often popular celebrities). The food becomes even better.A cultural fest known as vitopia and tech fest known as vtapp are organized. The college celebrates each and every festival wherein student get to show their local culture. It is fun and everyone enjoys. The hostellers are provided with special lunch/dinner on the day of festival. Well known celebrities are called for the big events and also ensures that every one enjoys it

The admission process is based on ARE which is Amrita all India extrance examination or JEE mains. The exam will be in the Month of April. I opted for the course because aerospace has a lot of scope in Amrita. This year GATE 1st all india rank in India was bagged by aerospace student of amrita. Every year at least 5 students get AIR below 100 from our department in Amrita. The coaching is at par with international institutions and the facilities are really good. The institution is reputed and has the very less background for drug usage. The gate pass system makes the parents comfortable in leaving us here.Anokha is the technical fest. It is inter college fest and is celebrated ij the month of February. Amritotsavam is ctural fest and is intra college and celebrated in the same Month. Ugathi celebrations, Pongal celebrations which is known as Vasantham, Gokulashtami celebrations are all very Grand in the college. Sports day also happens in the month of March. The college celebrates little festivals too and has a lot of ongoing stuff at all times

40 lectures per subject per semesters
PhD,Btech,Mtech graduates are apart of the faculty
Yes they have courses on various offbeat topics conducted thouroughout the year
There are email id's on the website
And WhatsApp groups with teachers
Also an app which helps connect teachers and students
Can recheck classes but video quality is poor
Most of the communication thourough Google groupsIt's a decently vast curriculum, teaching is mediocre. Exposure is also mediocre, Importance is given to academics alone.no importance to cultural activities
Good campus and labs
Research options are good
Exam structure is systematics
Computer based tests ensuring fair judgement

I'm tech enthusiastic so I chose this college because of much possibility and facilities are provided there are many courses about my stream so I don't need to worry about my future LPU Is just a blessing with less fess and more placements thanks god for all these.There are many events such as One India One World Youth Vibe Sunburn Dragon Ignite and much more you can enjoy every event at its best make friends roam in the campus have fun everything is all about fun with education and make all use of it never regret later.

For the electrical engineering department, there are a significantly large number( around 30) of faculty members to help the students. The associate professors generally have an experience of around five years, and often come fresh from the industry. Most of the associate professors have PhDs along with a few published paprs under their belt.
The assistant professors generally have an experience of around ten years, and undergo regular training and recertification. Assistant professors have quite a few published papers, regarding the various fields of research they have done. The senior professors are highly experienced, often having been teaching for fifteen or more years, having taken part in several research projects, and mentoring and assisting several students to achieve excellence in their chosen fields.
The faculty of our college are very supportive and helpful in dealing with several problems the students might face in their time in the college.Admission to NIT Silchar is obtained thourough JOSAA counselling, after gaining eligibility by giving JEE(MAIN) for engineering. Based on the rank thus obtained, and the preference list for colleges filled online, a branch is alloted among all of the NITs and other engineering colleges. After that, one has the option to either freeze at that particular branch at the same college, or choose float for a different branch at the same college, or move on to the next round of counselling. All in all there are 7 rounds of counselling, with all thouree options available for the first 6, and the first two options for the last.
Generally all these processes take place over July and August, and I ended up choosing electrical engineering, both because it fascinates me, and also because it is tough for me to sit still for long periods of time, so computer science and electronics ere out of the question.

Opted for this course as it is a good branch in Engineering and has alot of scope. Also engineering is the basic degree which offers alot of freedom for your career. The admission process involves writing either one of the entrance exams- cet or comedk and how well you score in it determines your rank on the basis of which you can get a seat depending on the vacancy of seatsCompanies such as Infosys, BEL, Wipro, and other cognizant etc come to our college for the placement drives. The recruitment steps consist of an aptitude test followed by an interview. Around 80% of the students get placed every year. Yes the college has special classed to prepare the students

We need to write an entrance exam like JEE mains and we need to get a good rank in that so that obviously we can get a good national institute of technology (nit). And then we need to apply colleges and later we get admission in that letter we have to come to the college for certificate verification purpose and then they provide as admission according to our rank and course and we can continue our graduation thereCampus life is good.we can do what ever we want with guidelines of our lecturers.we can go where ever we want because everything is around us.gender ratio is 3:1.all sports and computations are going well. We have fest called samar. This is totally based on sports and each and every branch likely 10 to 12 branches participate in this and even other colleges in Raipur likely to participate in our college

The placement in the college is better then any other private university in the competition. Many companies come for providing on campus placements to the students. Regular examination are being held to test the aptitude and also the qualification of the student to sit in the placement drive. The institution also organizes extra preparation classes for the students to be ready for the placement drive.
College also offers internship to students and encourage them to gain experience and to know the working of the job by regular summer training and internships.The fee structure is feasible and a budget friendly fee structure for many students. The institution also provides scholarship to almost all of the students based on the entrance exam conducted by the university and also based on the 12th board result. And the institution also provides transparency in the fee breakdown which provides a better option for many students to pay their fees. The institution also charges no external fee for the admission or to secure an admission to the course.

Male to female ratio is almost 7:3. The university is open and friendly to all people, United in diversity. There isn???t any discrimination. Although, NRI???s get preference for room allotment.
