college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text: My course has a good curriculum. I covers most important subjects of core electrical and one can select one minor course on any desired subject. The course is based on Credit system. So every subject is weighted according to it's lecture hours. We have a mid semester exam and a end semester exam. Mid sem covers 30% and end sem covers 60% while 10% is given by professors.There are many events in cultural technical and sports wise. We have Khanan the annual Geo mining fest. Concetto the technical fest. Basant the alumini meet. Hackfest the hackathon organised by Cse society. Srijan the culture fest. Parakram the sports event. Inter hostel sports. Pratibimb the Inter departmental competitions. And many other departmental events.

There are many branches 1. CSE
2. IT
3. ECE
4. EEE
5. MECHANICAL
6. CIVIL 7. BIOTECH
8. MBA
9. ARCHITECTURE
And many more Exam structure:-
We have 6 exams in one year 1. Cat1 50 marks exam converted into 15% weightage. 2. Cat2 open notebook 50 marks exam converted into 15% weightage.
3. FAT 100 marks exam having weightage 40%.
4. Three internal assessments of 10 marks each having 30% weightage.
Total 100 % same for another semester also.They are extremely helpful. We have many clubs and chapters here in College and all the senior guide us and help us in gaining knowledge. We work together with seniors even in we study together in the same classes all thanks to FFCS. There is no ragging at all in college and they share every experience with us and guide us on what to do next in our life. They are the perfect motivation to us.

For needy people,they do provide scholarships under different schemes. I not being an indian can't apply for scholarships provided by the university. But , for nepal students there is indian embassy which gives scholarship. For indians, you should fill forms and there are others process too but i don't have much idea on that.The placements and job opportunities are really handsome. If you do good in your studies and in your job interview,you get to receive a handsome offer from companies. College provides internship also. I am now in 2nd year. So i have not had any placements or internships. But i am reviewing this on seeing seniors life.

The placements and job opportunities are real and I've seen many people choosing my college for this reason only and i don't mind it since I've also choose this College for the same reason. Internships are provided by the college on regular biases but i haven't got any since i haven't participated in any and Hoping to get one within the 3rd year of my BTechI gave an Entrance test and then when the results came i was given scholarship on the basis of that and then all the procedure started happening for the admission i was asked to being all the required documents which were asked from the College administration to a decided place near my town where the administration officials were staying

college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Sri City - [IIIT]
review_text: Our college is a new one so we don't have much alumni and infrastructure but our seniors are very helpful. They help us lot intems of guidance and refering the books what to study and what not. They also take us into their current working projects which helps us a lot. A ragging free campus a big positive.Our college is a new one so we don't have much alumni and infrastructure but our seniors are very helpful. They help us lot in tems of guidance and refering the books what to study and what not. They also take us into their current working projects which helps us a lot.

For getting an admission in our college,one should clear the jee mains entrance examination. there will be an online counselling in which the qualified students are allowed to place a list of colleges and corresponding courses of their intrests.based on the merit or the rank he got in the entrance examination he is going to get a college from his choice of list.there goes 7 round of counselling session and then if you got the college of your choice,you should report at a particular place provided to you.later for further verification one should visit the college.Our college is the 1st ranked among the bits in overall percentage placements.most of the students with a certain amount of GPA are definitely going to be placed in a certain company. Daily there will be many interviews going on in the college for the 4 th years.internship are also going to be in the same way for the 3rd around 150 companies visit our college every year for placements.around 75% of owerall students and above 90% of eligible students are placed in the campus selections every year.

Yeah, placements are good. But not so good for mechanical and aeronautical branch. Most of the companies coming to our college are IT based companies. The number of mechanical companies visiting our college is less. And our college does not provide internship. But it allows us to go outside for internship programs.We should pay 84000 INR per year and also exam fees per semester. It is expensive only. Yeah the course and the college is also good. The staff is also good. The curriculum is also good. And i think they should concentrate on practicals. Si thar it can help the students in all directions.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: A lot of events happen in the college every semester. The main events include FROSH-This is a freshers week only for the newly admitted students. SATURNALIA-The annual techno cultural fest of TIET and is open to all the students of other colleges as well. It is a week ling event. STRATAGEM-The only economic fest of TIET. It is a multi event fest and consists of all types of entrepreneurship, bidding, shares and stocks events.I gave the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE). I filled the application form of the college. The college released a list of ranks eligible for specific branches and in 3 rounds online only. The alloted me my branch according to the preference I had set in my form. Then there was an in person counselling where hostel allotment and fees payment was to be done. The admission letter was given that day.

college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]
review_text: The course curriculum is good. It covers all the subjects that a student needs to be a part of practical world. Talking about Exam structure there are mainly two exams each semester mid term and end term along with these there are several quizzes and assignments are given to check the performance of the student.There is good interaction between juniors and seniors. Freshers get to know about the experiences of seniors and some secret stuff not shown by the college. But there is less interaction with alumni group it???s moreover restricted to their batch. But overall seniors are helpful in every means.

I gave the LPUNEST exam which provides admission in the University with the scholarship depending upon your marks you achieve in the LPUNEST exam.In the same way I also gave the LPUNEST exam which is just like any other competitive exam but this one was online exam.I cleared the exam with good marks so I got the opportunity to pursue Honors program also.Therefore now I am pursuing B.Tech CSE(Hons.).LPU provides 100 percent scholarship to the students who are among too three in LPUNEST exam, then 90 percent scholarship to those who are among top 10 percent students of LPUNEST and to next 15 percent it provides 80 percent scholarship and so on.

college_name: IIT Kharagpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITKGP]
review_text: Kshitij the techfest, Spring fest the cultural, National students space challenge, Departmental fest like samudhramanthan, Prithvi, Megalith. Kshitij is the techno management fest have a lot of participants from all over the country. Spring fest is one of the most colourful events in college with the programmes of famous artist and speeches of famous people.Yes, the alumni cell works actively keeping tje campus connected with its alumnis. The alumnis include google CEO Sunder Pichai and isro ex chairman K Radhakrishnan. The alumnies give valuable suggestions to the students regarding placements and intership as well as in funding the startuos by students.

college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]
review_text: Each year the is a technical fest called Techniti in which many technical competition and events takes place in which students from various institutions take part. There is also one cultural fest called Utkansh in which various events of dance and singing etc takes place. Also Bharat Dhwani is celebrated as the foundation day of the college.The course is of 4 years and is divided into 8 semesters of 6 months each. In each semester there are 5-6 theory subjects and 3-4 practical subjects. In the first year there is one subject from each branch of engineering and from 2nd year we have subjects of our branch. In each semester we have 2 minor exams and 1 major exam.

Technozion- It is a tech fest held every year in the college in the month of October or November. Several stalls are made by students showing their talents. Students from all over the country visit during this time.
Springspree- This fest is mostly about the cultural fest with varioud types of games and programs mostly related to extra curricular activities.Some of them are pretty good, most of them are helpful.Some professors are soo old that they cant even teach nicely. But anyways they try to help the student as far as possible. The new young professors of electronics department are very enthusiastic and they usually talk about the new technologies in the market place right now.

Bit mesra is a government funded tecknical institute (gfti) for getting admission in this college you need to attempt jee mains and qualify the exam and then on basis of the merit list the candidates are selection this whole process is under josaa joint seat allocation authority which is a government agencyThe faculty at bit mesra is pretty experienced most of teachers here are PhD qualified and are involved in various tecknical intervention all around the world also the college get new recruits from tequip every now and then most of the teachers are helpful and have deep knowledge about their subject

college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Sri City - [IIIT]
review_text: We have 2 major fests,the techfesia the technical fests where people from institutes like Iits attend to and the cultural fest abhisarga whichbis whole lot of fun Apart from these all the festivals were celebrated grandly with the music club and dance clubs always there to entertain.We even have Novato for the fresher's which is rather a small scale event.The college with respect to academics is excellent but the campus life still now isn't that satisfactory.The fee has always been high and we dont get to participate in inter college tournaments much. Placements have been average although have been increasing every year. Infrastructure needs to be developed

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text: There are numerous cultural and technical clubs and societies in this college which compete with other IITs at the annual Inter-IIT. Most of these clubs have built a commendable reputation for themselves by the virtue of their hard work and creativity. Students learn various skills such as photography, videography, art and craft dancing, singing, music, dramatics, poetry, literature, astronomy, debating and public speaking at the different cultural clubs while there are also technical clubs for coding and programming, robotics, formula cars, entrepreneurship-cell too. Students in these clubs also learn team work and event management along with these skills. Sports clubs for karate, chess, squash, boxing, badminton, hockey, football, cricket, athletics along with a few other also provide a good opportunity for the students to follow their hobby in sports and represent the college in Inter-IIT sports meet. But the major drawback of this college is that some of the sports and clubs are still not funded well enough to nurture and bring out the real talent of the students. The biggest drawback of this college is that even after having so many great extra-curricular facilities for students, the students still can not make good use of these facilities because they are already overburdened with their academics.Our college's timeline is filled with numerous fests and event. Srijan(cultural fest) and Concetto(Techno-Management fest) being the most awaited ones and are very well know for their magnificence in all of eastern India. Khanan, organised by mining department is the most famous fest for mining engineering students and attract numerous students from all over India. There are other departmental fests like Vibhav(electrical department) and Pratibimb and annual sports fests (parakram) along with various other events like Fotomela (annual photography exhibition organised by FotoFreaks, the official photography club of IIT ISM Dhanbad) and Basant (annual Alumni meet)

college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]
review_text: There are four major festivals that take place here. (1) The startup fest : E-Summit, it has some other counterparts too that take place around the year. (2) The sports fest : Udghosh (3) The cultural fest : Antaragni and (4) The technical fest : Techriti. Techkriti receives a lot of sponsorship from the countrywide companies as the college is popular for its technical performances. Apart from this, there are three other inter-hostel competitions (General Championship) : Inferno, Takneek and Galaxy. Galaxy is real deal. It's time when everyone gives his/her best to win the trophy. It's trophy is a real honour.It is a highly esteemed college in India. Students give two-three years of their lives to get into such a college. It is only the luck and determination of students that gets them here. Getting admission here is no less than an achievement itself. However, like all other government things in India, the facilities are somewhere not upto he mark. College is failing in he recent years to deliver the result it is expected. Hope this situation improves soon.

LPU has a variety of courses available for science, commerce and arts stream. The subjects of every course is divided properly from 1st year onwards. The examination system of LPU is good and conducts the examination properly. Mid-Term and End-Term examination are conducted every semester along with regular Class Assessments and projects.The university provides a vast options to all the students with many number of events that is being conducted within the university. From Sports to technical related, coding, speaking, dancing, singing and other extra curricular events are being organized. Debate and public speaking is also one of the events.

college_name: IIT Kharagpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITKGP]
review_text:
My college has a very celebrated culture.
We have 2 festivals in our college. One is cultural fest- "Spring fest" and the other is technical fest -"Kshitiz".
Both of these events are full of fun.
The former fest- Spring fest,marks days of absolute ecstasy, providing the budding artists a competing platform in diverse fields such as music, dance, theatre, fashion, photography, literature, fine arts, quizzing and debating.Spring Fest is an avenue to be comforted from the routine life and to embrace the fun and frolic embedded with tantalizing professional performances from India and abroad along with an addressal to the social responsibility with its underlying social theme.
The later one- Kshitij is the annual techno-management fest of IIT Kharagpur, one of India's premier technical institutions. Started in 2004, Kshitij was conceived with the aim to provide the technically inclined youth a national-level platform, where their talent and expertise would be recognized and rewarded.Here , you can play anything to everything. Most of the people are involved in sports and games. Many acitives keeps going in the college from time to time. People here are usually either busy in extra academics activites or academics.As far as labs are concerned, my college has setput my labs in the different departments of engineering. All labs are well furnished and are most updated with latest technology with help of huge government funding. For example in my departments itself there is more than 5 labs- welding lab, ship hydrostatics testing, ship stability testing, propulsion resistance, etc.

college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology
review_text: Passed JEE ( Main)-2018 held on 8 April 2018 by scoring 186 out of 360 marks. Got an All India Rank of 3500. I qualified for JEE Advanced 2018 which was held on 21 May 2018. I scored 152 marks out of 372 and an AIR of 5568. Later got a B.Tech course of Chemical Engineering and Technology at IIT(BHU) through JoSAA ( Joint Seat Allocation Authority).This is a four year course which is equally divided into eight semesters. For a student to graduate, they need to pass all the eight semesters. Their is also a chance of discipline change (branch change) given to first yearites. The overall course for a given branch is fixed with some elective courses to choose from.

Our college is one of the oldest college in this region it was established in 1967 under the name Regional College of engineering amd it was upgraded to National Institute of Technology in 2002 overall it is good and you can also get pretty ggod food and people also environment and many beautiful lakes etc you will get energetic environment also our college offers other course in higher education like M tech, phd, mba etc.There are two main college festival one is technical i.e Tecnoesis and other cultural i.e Incandescense many events are happening in college festival like robbo soccer, sumo war, and many other etc incandescence is quite enjoying. Many foreign band and famous indian artist or band were comming like last year polyphia perform in NIT Silchar.

college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology
review_text:
We have many clubs and council for extracurricular activities.
1. Film and Media council: Feilds like photography , cinematography , designing , animation , journalism fall in this council's work.
2. Cultural council which include dance ,singing, quiz,etc.
3. Sports council which take all matter related to sports.
All these council are great and much involving.Fees of IIT are getting higher and higher day by day. The fees is different for different family income and category.
For the students whose family income is more than 5 lakhs per annum the total fees is about 1.5 lakhs per semester.
For lower income group fees is about 50000 per semester.

The course I had choice is Cse which was good in my college and exam structure is firstly we had 3 class assignments for each subject and 1 mid term and 1 term and if we need pass in subject we need to get 40 marks and attendance is most important in our college.Indian science Congress which is done at last year and one world one India coke studio dj night ninja coding vocabulary building eating. There are so many events are done because the students are studying for some and management decided to events.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text: College is established in 1926 ,we are going to complete 100 years in 1926. We have large alumni base. Alumni network is quiet good. They come in college fests and others events. We have a particular fest for alumni named as Basant. College seniors are also very helpful. There is club run by cse department seniors named as codeIsm to help us to crack coding internships and placements.College is one of best college of India. Overall college is good but changes are still required to make it more better. Sports are only for professionals. Other co-curricural are good, clubs are good. Coming to placements departments like CSE, mining and petroleum are good but for other branches it needs to be improved.

college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]
review_text:
Scholorships offered by institution :
1. INSPIRE : It is a scholorship offers for meritorious students whose cumulative GPA is greater than 6.
2. DONOR : It is a scholarship offered for students whose annual income is less than six lakhs Indian rs. And whose cumulative GPA is greater than 6.
3. FBM : It is a basic mess and food scholorship offered for SC or SC candidates.
4. BANK LOAN OFFERS : SBI offers students loan for students of IIT Kanpur.Almost 80 percent of the students are placed in IIT Kanpur. Job opportunities are tremendous as IIT Kanpur is a premiere Institute in the country. Companies like Facebook , Microsoft offers jobs for students. Internships are also provided for students by the college. They are generally research oriented. Stipend for PhD fellow is about Rs. 25000 and for Post graduation fellow is Rs. 12500.

college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT]
review_text:
It's good and getting even better year-by-year. Almost all the students of CS/IT department gets placed with fairly good packages. Yes,my college provides internship for which various companies visit the college and select the students for internship.
I'm in 2nd year right now and I will be giving my internship exams next year.Senior students are very helpful. They help their juniors in various fields including technical and cultural activities. They teach juniors about robotics,aero modelling, competitive coding,etc.
Alumni network is quite good. Every year college invites various alumni to give speeches and motivate the students.

In the University we have nearly 100 clubs which conducts many events.
Even We can join in Clubs that enhance our skills. University has very good Lab Facilities. Even you can go to lab on holidays also. University has given nearly 10 acres ground. They have grounds and coach for every game.Yes, firstly I would like to say LPU is Ragging free university. Senior Students are very helpful to us. They help us in labs. We can stay with them in the same room. They will be helping in students. They join us while conducting events in University.

Industry oriented and very educative course curriculum of 8 semesters each of approx 6 months.
We have two exams that is mid semester and end semester exam each semester.Mid semester is of 50 marks consisting of 15 or 30 externals and 35 or 20 internals depending on practical or theory subject and end semester is of 50 marks written exam.Feasible fee structure and also most of students get UP government scholarship. Approx 125000 rupees per year for a student.
And approx 52000 rupees for hostel facilities per student.
Students admitted under fee waiver category are waived of tution fees.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text: The course structure is very good. The one who studies these subject combination in their respective branch when will be exposed to industrial or hands on practical work will do them with ease. The Exam structure is that in each year there will be two semester and each semester will have one mid sem exam and one end sem exam. Then there will be regular quiz, assignment and projects.IIT is known for their placements. Moreover ISM is famous world wide for its earth science department courses. The placement percentage of previous year was 75% and then there are also off campus placements. Moreover various companies come to hire pre final year students to provide them internship. There is also facility of scholarship based on means and merit.

college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text:
The main faculties such as professors and assistant professors are very well qualified with PhDs from reputed institutions of the country and the teaching style and patterns of these faculties are quite good. Though their are some faculties who are not as good in delivering knowledge and students attend their class just for attendance purpose. There are few faculties who can be rude sometimes but they are dealt with well by administration if reported. And their are a few Teaching Assistants who have Masters degree. They mainly assist the faculties in labs and also take some classes under the guidance of main faculties of concerned course. Here also some of the teaching assistants can be found not up to the mark but most do quite well in teaching.The placement and job opportunities are quite excellent over here. The main reason that the college attracts students form around the country and students toil hard to enter here are the excellent placement opportunities.
Many big companies related to various fields like IT, Software, Communication, Automobile, PSUs, Managerial, Consultancy, Construction related, Banking etc visit in large amount and give good placements to deserving students.
Yes, there are research internships provided in summer vacation at the college where the student can work on some research topic under some professor. The stipend is not quite large. The main thing is the learning that a student gets good amount of exposure and learning of the topic.

Gravitas and riviera and othet cultural programs. I attended entrance examination which is organized by vit and i got selected in third category and i managed to get in with ny my marks. This detail is more than enough why are you asking 200 characters.Excellent faculties with phd designation
I attended entrance examination which is organized by vit and i got selected in third category and i managed to get in with ny my marks. This detail is more than enough why are you asking 200 characters.

college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]
review_text: The Alumni network of the campus is gigantic. It has a huge alumni network lasting from the batch passing out in 1960s to the present. They even visit to campus to refresh their old and blissful memories. Many alumnus even visit their hostel rooms and tell stories to the students of our batch of their times. Alumni provide the best guidance to students and even offer them internship opportunities. Seniors are very helpful to the freshman. They guide them in amost every field. They teach them how to utilise time effectively which would be fruitful to them. Seniors also help out students with studies and other stuff.You get admitted to IITs (23 currently) through JEE Advanced. Eligibility criteria for appearing for JEE Advanced is to clear JEE Main. Nearly 12 lakh students appear for JEE Main out of which 2 - 2.5 lakh students get selected for appearing the next exam. Selection is based on a ranking system where each student gets an All India Rank. A separate rank list is prepared for students who are going for reservations. JEE Advanced is based on basic concepts in Physics, Chemistry and Maths (PCM).

I applied to their entrance exam by myself and then after the results, I went to the counselling office for admission after paying admission fee and submitting some documents they will finalize your admission and the total admission will end after coming to the college by verification of all certificates and etc.Extracurricular, we have a separate block for this named Division of Social and Welfare which is known as tera,13, your block where everybody can learn activities and for sports we have grounds and labs are in their own blocks with good equipment, and we have 3 Gyms and newly they started swimming pool.

Positive is well supportive upto 90%placements and only private beach of any other college in india. Awesome infrastructures of all the sports and labs and also cicuit and non cirxuit buildings and when I say 90% placements it applies to all the branches. We also have beautiful gardens which is one of the perfect places. Also we have health care center where people who are injures can go to doctors and of free of cost.also canteens are there too. We also have post office and banks and a wonderful library.Overall our college campus is about 295 acres.I got this college because of the pwd (person with physical disabilities), so I had eye problem so through jee exam i got into this college.while admission process you have to fill your details both personal and educational in online and you have to take printouts and there will be a particular room for submitting your details to officials you will upload everything on the iris which is our own website so in that your cgpa and your achievements will be added for further 4 years.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: Course is good. Teacher helps a lot to make it interesting life and exam structure is that there is MST that is mid semester test and EST end semester test and seasonal between them. Exam is soo easy just study so small to pass in exam.Thapar is best known for It's frosh week it is one month event only for the fresher.you will enjoy alot so many different society are there depending upon your interest you can join any of them you just have to give a small interview.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: I studied for 2 years for an entrance exam known as JEE Mains and Advance which is taken by CBSE. It is a prestigious exam given over 1.1 millions of students. I qualified the exam and got selected in the College by in-person counseling.All the course are designed in a way that each and every branch of students have to study every topic. It is very good in nature. The exam pattern is like school type. We have some internals, then mid semester and end semester.

All students of this institute atleast gets one job offer, as TCS and CTS are it's mass recruiter. But many students gets 2 or 3 job offers as it also depends on the capabilities of students. Coming to the internship one can get internship easily as it is located in a IT hub. I had also done internship in my 1st year as a UI/UX designer in a start-up of an Alumni. I had got a stipend of 4.5k per month.It's quite good. IEM is the best college among all other private colleges of eastern india, so it's course curriculum is also best. There are total 8 semester in whole BTech course. In each semester there is one Final exam or major and two minor exams are taken, along with practical exams.Studends are marked in each class through a class test per period.

college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology - [IIEST] Shibpur
review_text: Appeared JEE main exam and got admission Through JOSSA. It's very flexible. The sayllabus of the course is not too vast all you need to study regularly. Electronics is something if you want to do something you should have a deep knowledge of the subject I thinkIt's very flexible. The sayllabus of the course is not too vast all you need to study regularly. Electronics is something if you want to do something you should have a deep knowledge of the subject. I think that structure is available here.

Yeah, the placements in our college are more like they are about 20 to 30 companies visit our campus every year and 90% of the students are getting placed in the topmost companies with good salaries and yes there is an internship but I haven't experienced that so no comments.There are positive and negative remarks like our campus is very huge 300 acres we all do what we want in here play games and everything and negative is the infrastructure is somewhat old I think that should be changed.

college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr. Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology - [Vel Tech]
review_text: When I was in demise of not getting admission in any good college/institution then through a friend I have heard about this University. But it's too late for then to apply for the entrance exam. So there is a branch office near my home and I had consulted them regarding my problem, what they have said is that I can still get in with the 12th standard Marks I have got. So I shown them all the necessary certificates of my marks and they took me with a 50% scholarship and got admitted.Coming to the faculty for each department there will be only 4-6 professors and rest all are assistant professors with a PhD from a normal college all have studied and got that certificate from the local colleges only. They lack some quality regarding the concept dealing and it needs to be improved literally.

It is one of the best,through the courses are heavy we are getting a flexible timetable. We will have class assignments based on the subject credits,each subject will have their own credits more the credits more the weightage for the subject that will be added to your final grade,general for a practical exam there will be 4 practical exams and only one endterm exam and other subjects will have class assignments as mentioned above and a mid term exam and a end term exam.You will get scholarships based in your marks.
If you got above 95% in intermediate,LPU next(conducted by institute)a scholarship of 80000 in the first term of admission and a 60000 if scholarship in the 2nd term.
90% in intermediate,LPU next(conducted by institute)a scholarship of 60000 in the first term of admission and a 40000 if scholarship in the 2nd term.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text: Clubs and societies are very good. There are many clubs like litm (dance society) , roboism (robotics and ai club) and many more like photography club , arts club , debating club and more. Each club runs and is functioned by students.good amount of fund is given to each club.overall all clubs are exceptionally good. Sports is also very good. We have good condition playing ground for sports like cricket football, tennis , volleyball, basketball etc.Well overall college is very good and is providing many opportunities for the education as well as personality development of a student. Placement statistics is very good for cse and mnc students and other branch students who go for non-core jobs but in core the condition is not good especially in electronics btanch.core companies dont come to recruit student for ug students.for pg students its fine.

college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: There is a merit basis for getting the streams.For instance if you are getting a higher marks in JEE you are eligible for getting good streams such as computers science,electronics and computer etc. There are various counselling rounds and i was called in the second round and there were various formalities which were to be signed and then i got computer science branch on the basis of my JEE marks.Faculty of Thapar is good. There are many hard working teachers which teach with full enthusiasm and passion. There are extra classes if a teacher has to cover up the syllabus. There is 75% attendance criteria which has to be religiously followed. Teachers are very strict about this rule. Also there are many teachers who did not teach up to the level but their number is relatively very less.

college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]
review_text: All types of extracurricular activities of all the three councils are happening throughout the year in the college. All types of cultural, tech clubs are functioning in the college. Sports facilities are of top notch quality. All types of grounds and fields are present in the college. Gym is also there. Labs are well equipped with the latest technology computers and machinery with air conditioned well furnished furniture.Since I'm in the first semester of second year, I have not applied or I'm not even eligible for internships but yes many of my seniors are well placed and are doing internships. This year average was around 10 lakhs per annum with people placed in companies like Amazon, Adobe, Goldman Sachs, Microsoft etc. Samsung and Amazon also offered internships to the 3rd and 4th year students.

BIT is a GFTI (Government Funded Technical Institution). As it is owned by Birla, it is a private institution (ranked 2nd in private colleges) and fee structure is expensive. Tuition fee every semester goes around 1 lakh which makes it 2 LPA just for tuitions. Hostel fee is around 5 thousand per month. So yeah, annual expenditure for tuitions and hostel is around 2.5 LPA to 3 LPA.The only and most important plus point of the college is its placements. CSE here gets an average package of 10 LPA while the highest package goes aa high as 34 LPA. Not only CSE, even other courses have very decent placements, with over 70% of the students getting placed almost each year. However, the college doesnt provide internships.

Gravitas- it's a technical event in which clubs and chapters come forward to showcase their talents and ideas to a presentation as a fare and events conducted with music, stall, scientific things, robots, airplanes, bikes, and many competitions between different colleges. review_text:

I wrote the JEE (Mains) entrance examination and got lucky actually, because there are like 4 different question paper and a single rank list. I was lucky because I received an easier question paper and secured AIR 7377 and got myself into the computer science branch of my home state NIT. It requires a lot of formalities which include going into the NITC website and registering in that(through Josaa) and then being present in the college itself for another round of formalities of getting documents such as our 10th and 13th std Board marks, birth certificate, and all such important documents and getting it all signed by the authorities respectively. It takes quite a while for this whole process to be over with and indeed, it was relief when it was all done. We have two main festivals in our college. Tathva - the technical fest and Ragam - the cultural fest. Tathva includes all kinds of workshops like robotics and all, and we've events including Wheels - a showcase of all amazing and varieties of cars and bikes, and all fun things to do related to the engineering phase. There are also DJ nights where we invite well known people like Amit Mishra, DJ Litchi etc. Ragam is more cultural and we all put in months of practice for this fest. It has more hype and it has been there for decades and hence, it is well known in South India. 
There are also other small events which occur in our college for specific people and it is very entertaining to be part of them or to be the people conducting them.

college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology
review_text:
The events celebrated in our college are-:
1. Codefest - this is our coding fest which is conducted online and has a variety of competitions which includes competitive programming , machine learning , app development , capture the flag and etc.
2. Aagman- this fest is for freshers in which they showcase their talent in field of dancing, indian music, western music, drama, debates ,poetries etc.
3.Spardha- this is one of the biggest games and sports fest of india.
Students from all over india come to participate in a number of sports competition which goes on for 3 days including cricket, hockey , badminton, basketball, tennis,football and a lot more. We have dj nights as well.
4. Texhnex- this is our technical fest which brings a lot of participation form students all over the country in various competitons like drone making, line crawler , water powered crane models , water rocket, airplane models and a lot.
Each day ends with either a dj night or some other entertaining event such as a stand up comedy or music show.
This year , KK was invited to perform in technex music show which was held in night.
5.kashiyatra-. This is our cultural fest which holds a number of competition like solo dance , duo dance , group dance , music in all three categories and drama.
There are events like debates , poetries, roastings and a lot more.Course curriculum is very diverse andi think that is important.
I m a computer science student currently in my 2nd year. In my first year , I studied physics,biology ,maths 1 and 2 ,humanities and engineering drawing too which have nothing to do with my department but are essential for knowledge of an engineer.
I also had C programming , linux and Python courses , data structures wHich are my departmental courses.
In every semester, for every subject there are 2 quizzes, 2 or more assignments ,mid term and an end term written examination.
Some subjects have labs as well and in labs which are held every week , there are experiments , viva and lab records have to be maintained.

It is available for district toppers, branch toppers, entrance exam toppers and financially weak students. Moreover those who maintain 100% attendance in lectures are also rewarded. Many banks provide student loans based on their academic performance.The college has a strong alumni network and that remain connected through various social media platforms. There is an Alumni association and portal where the students can discuss issues and future prospects with the passed out.

college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text:
ABHINANDAN-
It's like a Freshers party. Only the first years are included in this. It's supposed to be so much fun. But honestly, it's normal. It doesn't even match a school's annual day functions.
SPARSH-
It's an yearly event and a techno-cultural fest. This is a little better than Abhinandan. Technical events take place during the day and cultural events during the night. And there's also something called celebrity night in which a celebrity comes to the college. We used to have EDM night which was the best part but we don't have it anymore because the Dean doesn't like it.We get some good scholarships here. The most important one is the fee reimbursement based on the economic conditions. If the fee is below 1 lakh, we get a full fee reimbursement for tution fee. Also, there are some other scholarships like FFE. It's a good one. People who are economically backward can apply for this and there is a high chance of getting the scholarship.

Our college infrastructure is very good with greenery all around. So we don't face the problem of pollution as we all use bicycles for the transportation purpose. And since our University is in the state of Assam at the boarder of india, we have a fear of a terrorist attack. The alumni network of our University is good and makes all the updates available to the viewers. They work so that there is no problem faced by the students. And finally they are very helpful to us. The seniors are also very helpful.

The course curriculum is quite different from other colleges. We can select all subjects to be learned each semester. Here the credit system is there. So we have to complete at least 180 credits. The system is called a fully flexible credit system. There are courses that are core and electives. Core subjects should be compulsorily completed. There are mainly two internals and one final exam. Besides, assignments and quizzes will be there. Projects are there for selected coursesFor getting admission in vit first we have to write the vitee entrance exam conducted by vit. As eligibility, you should score at least 75% in the board exam. According to the rank that u have got they will allow you in any one slot out of the 5 slots according to that we can select the courses.

There are 4 major events in our college - Pantheon, Bitotsav, Vajra and Hack-A-BIT. Pantheon is the annual technical fest, Bitotsav is the annual cultural fest, Vajra is the annual sports meet and Hack-A-BIT is the annual Hackathon. They are organized with great pomp and splendour and eminent Bollywood personalities perform in the closing nights of these fests.The course curriculum has been updated recently to match the recent CBCS system of education. In the computer science stream, modern topics of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence have been added. 
The Exam structure is very rigid. We get grades and they are used to calculate our CGPA and SGPA. There is no relative marking.

There are many scolarship which are community wise scolarship and first graduate sholarship and alumni scholarship which are very good for economically back ward students and it is approchable and the loan facility is also goodThey are good and the ministry of human resource and development monitors that and so our course curriculum is much better than that of many other colleges in tamilnadu and also in india and also contains various activities

First year student are seperated away from rest of the years to safe guard then from raggin activity which adds to the plus point of the college that makes this campus truly ragging free.Overall alumni network are big which help in good placement of the collegeInfrastructure is mostly old which adds as a negative point over beautification of the college but the old infrastructure is mostly maintained.The campus is slightly small campared to the most of NITs of same tier and library facilities are less.

review_text: Course curriculum is very vast and includes courses from other branches also. First year is common for all branches with subjects from all the branches. college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]

review_text: Firstly I gave JEE-Main and qualified it by securing AIR 3512. Then I gave JEE-Advanced and qualified it by securing AIR 1845. Then I was eligible to take admission in any IIT. college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]
review_text:
College has never ending list of activities. The major events happening during the entire year is one the freshers party (Abhinandan in the year 2018) for first year (BTech, MTech, PhD, MSC). And the biggest cultural and technical fest in Gujarat is SPARSH which consists of four days and three nights. Techincal, school events take place in days and in three nights- Singing night, Dancing night and celebrity night take place. Events never end. A sports fest also takes place which is IGNIS (colleges from every corner participate in this event).Every club of the college conducts events during the entire year. There are more than 20 clubs which constist of cultural clubs, branch focussing clubs, language clubs, techincal clubs and many more. The first event of the college is conducted by HINDI CELL during September. events like WOW, SPANDAN, SYNCRONIZE, SYMPHONY, UNPLUGGED, SHAMIYANA happen which are cultural events (dance, music, art, poetry, drama etc.). Inter year sports event also occur. Festival celebrations are also done in the college like Independence Day, Republic Day, Janmasthmi, Lori, holi, Ram-Navmi etc. Hostels also celebrate their own events like sports day, hostel day etc. The college also has a team of NCC made NSS members. Being an NIT certain admission process is to be followed for getting enrolled in this college. Firstly you have to give the entrance exam which is JEE MAINS. If you fulfill the criteria for selection then counselling process starts which is done by JOSAA. In this in the beginning preferences are to be filled since JEE MAINS makes it possible for admission in NITS, IIITs and GFTIs. Counselling process consists of 7 rounds in which seat allocation is done according to your rank in JEE MAINS. Once you get a seat in any of the round you have to go to nearest NIT for the procedure and seat confirmation. Options like Freeze, Float, Slide are available for seat allocation in the counselling.
There is a major benefit in this college which is:- even if you don't get the best branch here which you always wanted but have a will to study hard and get good CGPA then BRANCH CHANGE option is available here.

JEE Main will be conducted two times in a year and it will be conducted by National Testing Agency (NTA). JEE Mains is India's most important exams as it is a gateway to most prestigious institutions of India. Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) MAIN will be conducted by the NTA from 2019 onwards. This Examination was being conducted by the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) till 2018. The national level exam will be conducted twice a year (January and April) in online (computer based) mode. Candidates can appear in either of the two or both.Paper has three subject sections: Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry. Each one of the 3 subject sections consists of 30 questions each with equal weightage for every question. All questions are multiple choice objective-type questions each of which has four choices. Out of the four choices for a given question, only one choice is correct. Every correct answer will receive 4 marks each and every incorrectly attempted question will receive a negative marking of -1 mark. There is no negative marking applied if the question is left unanswered.Yes NSUT provides internships. The past performance of the outgoing batches has done us proud. In the past,eight students have been offered an annual package of Rs. 1.35 crores from Google.Apart from that, various companies like Goldmun sachs Intuit, Microsoft, Amazon, 
Adobe,Walmart,LinkedIn,Direct I among others have been visited NSUT regularly for placements and number of companies has been rise ever since. There is an internship round at the end of 3rd year in which various companies including bigwigs like Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, etc come to hire interns. The average stipend offered is about Rs 30000/- per month. The experience is quite fruitful and you get to learn a lot of new things like working in pressure, limited time, and also new technical skills. If you work sincerely, the internship may lead to a full time job offer.

college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]
review_text:
I have only positive remarks about our college. There is a rule in our college.
If any junior is found having something in any restaurant or hotel or canteen seniors should even pay for him. The sports, labs and extracurricular activities here are very good.
We have almost all types of sports.
We even have a swimming pool and squash court.
The labs here are great. The lab devices and instruments are in good working condition.Yes, they are very helpful.
Will provide help and support to many of our clubs by donating money and even necessary items.
They sponsor money for the different fests of our college.
Senior students here are very helpful. They are very friendly to us.
They will provide the materials required for our classes and clarifies our doubts regarding any activities in the college.

The faculties in the college are very well experienced and well knowledgeable. Also, almost all of the faculties have completed their doctorate. The faculties are easily accessible and also friendly. They will be always ready to clear students doubts and guide them to the core.There are many events that are celebrated in college. The main three are Colosseum, Daksh, and Kuruksastra. All three are national level fests. Colosseum is a national level sports meet. Daksh is a national level technical event and the other is a cultural event.

There is a 100% placement in VIT, Vellore. All sorts of companies visit college every year. This year 502 companies visited the campus. Jobs can be in the IT sector (3.5 lakh pa), in dream companies (>5 lakh pa), and super dream companies (>10 lakh pa). The highest package was 30 lakh pa offered by Microsoft and the average package was 5.75 lakh pa. VIT also gives internships to students. There are internship expos conducted and everything is quite good. Students may also do internships in start-ups from VIT itself. I myself haven't done any internship yet but surely will this year.The course curriculum in VIT is one of the best in India for all branches. Students can make their own timetable from the second semester. This includes choosing your own faculty, place of lecture, and class timings. Exams in VIT are divided into two CATs (Continuous Assessment Tests) and one FAT (Final Assessment Test). Apart from this, there are Digital Assignments and Quizzes in all subjects. Students may also opt for additional learning if they fall short of marks in a subject.

There are two cycles for 1st year:-
Physics cycle and chemistry cycle 
There are two labs for the physics cycle that is physics lab and mechanical workshop lab and for the chemistry cycle, there are 3 labs that are chemistry lab, computer programming lab, and AutoCAD lab.
For sports, there are basketball court one football/cricket ground, volleyball ground, lawn tennis ground, squash, table tennis, gymnasium, etc.There are 10-12 branches that are taught in this college which i am talking only for engineering and there are other streams also such as pharmacy, dental science, B-com, BBA,MTECH,MBA.
The exam structure is like that there will be 3 internal exams in one semester which carries of 50% weightage and which will be conducted each month and at last there will be external exams which carries of 50% weightage.

The national institute of technology is famous for its cultural and technical events throughout a year. Tathva is the Techfest of our college which contains many technical events DJ night etc. Ragam is the cultural fest which is conducted in the month of March which one of the best cultural fests in India.
Other events are
Techweek
Cultweek
Athreya
PrithviNIT Calicut follows a continuous evaluation policy. Each semester contains Two tests and a final end semester examination. The marks for each examination is decided by the course faculties and student representatives. The exams are of high standard and evaluation is strictly based on evaluation policy.

review_text: My Jee mains rank was 12877. I wanted to opt for either computer science or information technology as I loved coding. college_name: IIT Jodhpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITJ]
review_text: The course are being modified in accordance to the need of the industry and what industry requires from their employees and it is latest. review_text: The course curriculum about the college is fine and it is nice when on coming to the first year you will be feel like 12 class as the study in the first year will be somewhat similar to the 12 class and slightly change and the syllabus will start differing from the second year/semester.

review_text: We have the cultural fest, technical fest and also cultural activites on some festivals and national holidays. The cultural fest of IIITV is Kreiva. Also, the fee structure is quite lower than many other IIITs.

There are various options available after graduation some of these are higher education, entrepreneurship, community service and defense services. CDC prepares students across all streams for these outcomes. Since its first batch graduated in 2015, SNU has continued to be a preferred hiring choice for both Indian and international organizations ranging from Multi-Disciplinary Employers, Consulting companies, Engineering and Manufacturing companies, Startups, Think Tanks, Financial institutions, Academic institutions, NGO???s and Social establishments etc. It has been successful in its placement strategies till now.There were many factors some of which are : 1. The building structure, the response from faculty and the overall aesthetics were very appealing. 4. The average package is also pretty good which made my parents agree to my demand of joining this college. 5. Overall it was a smooth experience from applying to getting the campus tour and finally confirming my seat.

Campus of Lovely professional university is amazing. Sex ratio is good as compared to another college university. Lovely professional university has good placement records. college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Vadodara - [IIIT-V]
review_text: Campus life is quite good. There are many clubs in the institute which will help you to explore your inside. college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]
review_text: Course curriculum is okay but old. Needs to be updated and unnecessary subjects removed. Since I'm a first year student, I can't say for sure about the industrial exposure but I've not heard my seniors complain about it. I've been provided with numerous opportunities to attend internships, both paid and unpaid. The faculty in my first semester was good but in the second semester it was quite poor.Very Close to home. The college is known for Good quality placements in the North region. The college has a large campus with availability for numerous sports and everyday events for students to attend. I opted the course because I like working with computers. I'm a dropper so it was the only choice for me.

Most of the students are from Bihar, Jharkhand, and West Bengal. And of them, half are from different coaching centers. Overall, 2. 5/5 rating for academic and placements. College Life is good. Male to female ratio is highest, 1. 5:1. There are many societies for modeling, sports, photography, technology, coding, singing, dancing, etc.Very expensive. 18-20 lacs for 4 year BTech is not a logical option. Though I am in this college. Hostel and mess fees are high too. Per semester, hostel and mess fees are 36000 and 18000. The academic fee is 225000 per semester. Not at all a good college unless you are from a rich family.

Yes it's fair. We have exams and assignments on specific topics so that we can learn from them fullfledgedly. In my perspective professors are making us think about the subject in deeper. We were provided with facilities like 24/7 computers and wifi services. On campus placements are actually core and non core. Core in the sense going to a field related to our branch. Non core in the sense going to a field other than our branch. It can be anything software or civils ar MBA anything. Industrial visits were organised for students in a particular semester.Campus life is divine. We have a sports Centre and 4 minor grounds and 1 major ground. We have gym. And we have swimming pool and we have all sports equipment. We have many sports competition during fests. Workshops will be conducted on different aspects like AI, Robotics etc. Gender ratio for our batch was 10:3, We haveany cultural clubs as well as educational clubs through which we can get in contact with everyone. Religion, race doesnt matter among us. Ethnicity is quite normal. There is no sexual harassment and even no ragging.

Campus Life was too good there is no force from the authority to study study and all. the university helps you in the overall development not only in the academic part but also in the sports. And there are labs which gives us the practical knowledge and the hands on experience and even the student organizations like SAE and all helps you in the overall development.The faculty really helps you out in making you a professional the best infrastructure and the best faculty ever who were so friendly to you. The examination structure is same as the other competitive exams with the negative marking and all here we come to know that while giving an exam we have to be fully prepared for it.

It is a good private college after Bits and Thapar. Placements are also good. I also had an option of vit and my rank was approx 11k so I would get ecs so I opted for kiit and here I got CSSE. First, you have to give entrance, and then on a merit basis, you will be given a date for counseling where you can choose the branch you want on the basis of availability.A huge campus of approx 850 acres. I m a first-year student and I have not explored the campus yet. The kiit campus also has a cricket stadium, football ground, and synthetic hockey stadium. You also find many sports center here where TT, badminton, gym, snooker, squash, and many more. Here volleyball and synthetic lawn tennis court are also available.

college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]
review_text: Course structure here is perfect and at the same time a bit difficult too. Only students who study properly can get decent grades.To clear advanced, you have first to make the JEE Mains. It is assumed that jee main is a bit easier than jee advanced exam as its syllabus is fixed and level of difficulty that students face in advance is far more than that in mains. It is a prestigious exam in the whole country, and only intelligent students crack the exam. In order to crack the exam and get into this college, one has to study very hard and regularly, so do I. One has to go to coachings for getting precise knowledge about the curriculum and fundamentals and has to give a series of test tests and exams in those coachings. The prime focus here is on the learning and also tp promote research opportunities.Here we have lectures five days a week, and we have holidays at the weekends. To clear advanced, you have first to make the JEE Mains. It is assumed that jee main is a bit easier than jee advanced exam as its syllabus is fixed and level of difficulty that students face in advance is far more than that in mains. It is a prestigious exam in the whole country, and only intelligent students crack the exam. In order to crack the exam and get into this college, one has to study very hard and regularly, so do I. One has to go to coachings for getting precise knowledge about the curriculum and fundamentals and has to give a series of test tests and exams in those coachings. Here there is no such pressure or burden on students as it is assumed.

college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT]
review_text: Currently, the infrastructure in the Institute is under renovation which is very promising. The last few months of stay in the hostel has led me to observe all the developments. The library is one of the largest building in the campus with almost access to every resource.
